sentences: The traffic was moving at a snail's pace because of the accident. 由於事故，交通正以蝸牛般（步伐）緩慢的速度移動。
Technology has managed to change at a very rapid pace lately now. 科技最近現在竟然（能）以非常快的速度（步伐）在變化。

meaning: 生性愛好和平；避免暴力。
sentences: Something described as pacific is preferring peace by nature; avoiding violence. 被描述為和平的東西本質上更喜歡和平；避免暴力。
The word pacific is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 太平洋這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。
The baby stopped crying after she was given her pacifier. 寶寶在給了她安撫奶嘴後停止了哭泣。
Don't forget to pack a clean pacifier for the trip. 別忘了為旅行帶一個乾淨的安撫奶嘴。

meaning: 愛、支持或贊成和平的人。
sentences: Mahatma Gandhi was one of the world's most famous pacifists. 聖雄甘地是世界上最著名的和平主義者之一。
The term pacifist refers to one who loves, supports, or favours peace. 和平主義者一詞是指愛、支持或贊成和平的人。
I need to pack my suitcase for my trip to Japan tomorrow. 我需要為明天去日本的旅行整理行李箱。
The hikers each carried a heavy pack on their backs. 登山者每個人背上都背著一個沉重的包。
The courier delivered a large package to our house this morning. 快遞員今天早上送了一個大包裹到我們家。
The software package includes everything you need to start. 這個套裝軟體包含了你開始所需的一切。

meaning: 一個以收拾東西為業的人；尤其是包裝食品以供保存的人。
sentences: He works as a pork packer. 他是一名豬肉包裝工。
a household goods packer 家庭用品包裝工
He bought a small packet of biscuits and some eggs at the supermarket. 他在超市買了一小包餅乾和一些雞蛋。
Please make sure you follow the instructions provided on the packet. 請務必遵循包裝盒（小袋）上提供的說明。
write up a pact 寫一個契約
New sisters at the sorority have to agree to the pact set out by the former members. 聯誼會的新姊妹必須同意前成員所製定的協議。
She used a soft ink pad to stamp the important documents. 她用一個軟印泥墊為重要文件蓋章。
I always keep a small notepad near the phone to write messages. 我總是在電話旁放一本小筆記本（墊）來記下訊息。

meaning: 任何沒有價值的東西都用來填補空間。
sentences: That magazine is mostly advertisements; the rest is padding. 那本雜誌主要是廣告 ； 其餘的是 填充 。 那本雜誌主要是廣告；剩下的就是填充。 那本主要雜誌是廣告；其餘的是填充。
The term padding refers to Anything of little value used to fill up space. 術語「填充」是指用於填充空間的任何沒有什麼價值的東西。 術語「填充」是指用於填充空間的任何沒有什麼價值的東西。 術語「填充」是指用於填充空間的任何沒有任何價值的東西。
He used a wooden paddle to steer the small boat through the canal. 他用木槳駕駛小船通過運河。
The children enjoyed paddling in the shallow water at the beach. 孩子們喜歡在海邊的淺水處涉水。
The term paddling refers to The act of using a paddle. 劃槳一詞是指使用槳的行為。
We learned the meaning of paddling during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了劃槳的意義。

meaning: 進行比賽的場地；一個運動場。
sentences: The term paddock refers to a field on which a game is played; a playing field. 圍場一詞是指進行比賽的場地；一個運動場。
The lesson introduced paddock as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了圍場作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
throw a paddy etc. 丟稻穀等。
The term paddy refers to a fit of temper; a tantrum. 「稻穀」一詞指的是脾氣暴躁。發脾氣。

meaning: 羅馬天主教或聖公會牧師。
sentences: The term padre refers to a Roman Catholic or Anglican priest. 神父一詞指的是羅馬天主教或聖公會的牧師。
The lesson introduced padre as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 padre，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 不信奉世界主要宗教的人；泛神論或自然崇拜宗教的追隨者。
sentences: This community has a surprising number of pagans. 这个社区的异教徒数量惊人。
The term pagan refers to a person not adhering to a main world religion; a follower of a pantheistic or nature-worshipping religion. 異教徒一詞是指不信奉世界主要宗教的人；泛神論或自然崇拜宗教的追隨者。
Please turn to page twenty-five of your textbook. 請翻到課本的第 25 頁。
The novel is over five hundred pages long. 這部小說長達五百多頁。
To pageant means to exhibit in show; to represent; to mimic. 選美意味著在表演中展示；代表；模仿。
People may pageant in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下參加選美活動。
The children were playing with sand and pails on the beach. 孩子們正在海灘上玩沙子和提桶。
He filled the pail with water to wash the car. 他往桶裡裝滿水來洗車。
She has been experiencing a lot of pain in her lower back lately. 她最近下背部一直感到很疼痛。
The medicine helped to relieve the intense pain from the surgery. 藥物幫助緩解了手術帶來的強烈疼痛。
Losing a loved one is an extremely painful and difficult experience. 失去所愛的人是一次極其痛苦且艱難的經歷。
He had a painful injury during the championship football match. 他在冠軍足球賽中受了痛苦的傷。

meaning: 以一種痛苦的方式；彷彿在痛苦中。
sentences: I limped painfully down the stairs. 我痛苦地一拐一拐地走下樓梯。
If someone acts painfully, they do so in a way that is in a painful manner; as if in pain. 如果某人的行為是痛苦的，那麼他們就是以一種痛苦的方式這樣做的；彷彿在痛苦中。
He took a strong painkiller to relieve his headache. 他服用了強效止痛藥來緩解頭痛。
The doctor prescribed a variety of painkillers for the patient. 醫生為病人開了多種止痛藥。
Modern dentistry has made many dental treatments painless. 現代牙科學使許多牙科治療變得無痛。
The medical procedure was quick and painless. 該醫療程序非常迅速且無痛。
The restoration of the ancient ruins required painstaking work. 修復這座古老遺跡需要艱苦細緻的工作。
She provided a painstaking account of the events. 她對事件進行了詳盡細緻的描述。
The coach spoke painstakingly during the discussion. 教練在討論時說話很painstakingly。
The coach replied painstakingly and solved the issue. 教練painstakingly地回應，並解決了問題。
They decided to paint their living room a light blue color. 他們決定將客廳油漆成淺藍色。
She spent the afternoon painting a beautiful landscape. 她花了一下午畫了一幅漂亮的風景畫。
She is a very talented landscape painter who travels all over. 她是一位非常有才華、周遊各地的風景畫家。
The house painter arrived early this morning to do the job. 粉刷匠今天一早抵達並開始工作。
She has a beautiful collection of traditional Chinese landscape paintings. 她收藏了大量的中國傳統山水畫。
The talented artist spent months working on her latest large painting. 那位有才華的藝術家花了數月時間創作她最新的大型畫作。
He bought a new pair of leather shoes for the interview. 他為面試買了一雙新的皮鞋。
A pair of small birds built a nest in the tree outside. 一對小鳥在我窗外的樹上築了巢。
He put on his warm flannel pajamas and went to bed early. 他換上暖和的法蘭絨睡衣，早早就上床睡覺了。
The children were wearing colorful matching pajamas on Christmas morning. 孩子們在聖誕節早晨穿著繽紛的成套睡衣。
He has been my best pal since we were in primary school together. 自從小學起，他就是我最好的夥伴（朋友）。
They spent the afternoon hanging out with their pals in the park. 他們下午和朋友們在公園裡閒逛度過。
The royal palace is one of the most famous landmarks in the city. 皇宮是該市最著名的地標之一。
They took a guided tour of the magnificent ancient stone palace. 他們參觀了那座宏偉的古代石造宮殿。
The food was simple but very palatable. 食物雖然簡單但非常美味。
The new policy was not palatable to many citizens. 這項新政策不被許多公民接受（不合意）。

meaning: Mental relish;對某事的喜歡或親和力。
sentences: The term palate refers to mental relish; a liking or affinity for something. 味覺一詞指的是精神上的享受；對某事的喜歡或親和力。
The lesson introduced palate as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「味覺」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
They live in a palatial mansion on top of a hill. 他們住在一座小山頂上的宮殿般豪宅裡。
The hotel features a palatial lobby with glass ceilings. 這家飯店設有一個帶玻璃天花板的宏偉大廳。
We wasted hours in useless palaver during the meeting. 我們在會議期間浪費了幾個小時進行無用的空談。
What's all this palaver about? 這些囉唆到底是為了什麼？
She looked pale and tired after working all night in the office. 辦公室忙了一整晚後，她看起來臉色蒼白且疲憊。
The walls were painted a pale shade of blue to create a calm atmosphere. 牆壁被漆成淡藍色，以營造寧靜的氣氛。

meaning: 一組可供使用（或混合）的顏色。
sentences: Use your mouse to select the colour you want to use from the circular colour palette. 使用滑鼠從圓形調色板中選擇要使用的顏色。
The term palette refers to a set of colours available to be used (or mixed). 調色板這個術語是指一組可供使用（或混合）的顏色。

meaning: 原子序數為46的化學元素（符號Pd）：一種稀有、有光澤的銀白色金屬。
sentences: The term palladium refers to a chemical element (symbol Pd) with an atomic number of 46: a rare, lustrous silvery-white metal. 鈀一詞是指原子序數為 46 的化學元素（符號 Pd）：一種稀有、有光澤的銀白色金屬。
The lesson introduced palladium as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了鈀作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 便攜式平台，通常設計為可以通過叉車輕鬆移動，上面可以堆放貨物，以便運輸或儲存。
sentences: The term pallet refers to a portable platform, usually designed to be easily moved by a forklift, on which goods can be stacked, for transport or storage. 托盤一詞是指一種便攜式平台，通常設計為可以通過叉車輕鬆移動，可以在其上堆放貨物，以進行運輸或存放。
The lesson introduced pallet as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了托盤作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 緩和的東西，特別是緩和藥物。
sentences: The radiation and chemotherapy were only palliatives. 放療和化療只是安寧療護。
The term palliative refers to Something that palliates, particularly a palliative medicine. 術語“安寧療護”是指“安寧療護”，特別是安寧療護藥物。
The tropical island is famous for its beautiful sandy palm beaches. 這個熱帶島嶼以其美麗的棕櫚沙灘聞名。
She held the tiny little bird gently in the palm of her hand. 她將那隻小鳥輕輕地握在手掌心中。

meaning: 一位去過聖地並帶回象徵意義的棕櫚枝的朝聖者；流浪的宗教信徒。
sentences: The term palmer refers to a pilgrim who had been to the Holy Land and who brought back a palm branch in signification; a wandering religious votary. 帕爾默（palmer）一詞指的是一位前往聖地並帶回棕櫚枝的朝聖者；流浪的宗教信徒
The lesson introduced palmer as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 Palmer 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
He used a palmtop computer to store his contacts and schedule. 他利用掌上型電腦儲存聯絡人和日程安排。
Palmtop computers were popular before the rise of smartphones. 在智慧型手機興起前，掌上型電腦非常流行。
He suffered from cerebral palsy since birth. 他自幼患有腦性麻痺。
The news seemed to palsy her with fear. 這個消息似乎讓她因恐懼而癱瘓。

meaning: 在小冊子中寫下（某人或某事）；以小冊子的形式發行（某些材料）。
sentences: To pamphlet means to write about (someone or something) in a pamphlet; to issue (some material) in the form of a pamphlet. To pamphlet 的意思是在小冊子中寫下（某人或某事）；以小冊子的形式發行（某些材料）。
People may pamphlet in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下製作小冊子。
She is cooking a large pan of vegetable soup for dinner. 她正在煮一大鍋蔬菜湯當晚餐。
Please put the dirty frying pan in the kitchen sink after use. 使用後請將髒平底鍋放進廚房水槽。
I usually have fresh pancakes with honey and fruit for breakfast. 我早餐通常吃新鮮的蜂蜜水果鬆餅。
She made a batch of delicious homemade pancakes for the children. 她為孩子們做了一批美味的手作薄煎餅。
The pancreas produces hormones like insulin to regulate blood sugar levels. 胰臟分泌胰島素等荷爾蒙來調節血糖水平。
The doctor discussed the functions of the pancreas in the digestive system. 醫生解釋了胰臟在消化系統中的功能。
Something described as pancreatic is belonging or relating to the pancreas. 被描述為胰腺的東西屬於或與胰腺有關。
The word pancreatic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 胰臟這個字常用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。
The giant panda is a beloved symbol of peace and conservation. 大貓熊是受人喜愛的和平與保育象徵。
We saw a family of pandas happily eating bamboo at the zoo. 我們在動物園看到一群貓熊正開心地吃著竹子。
The government is taking measures to prevent a new global pandemic. 政府正採取措施防止新的全球大流行病。
The disease has become a major pandemic concern. 該疾病已成為重大的流行病擔憂。
The term pandora refers to any fish of the genus Pagellus. 潘朵拉這個字指的是佩吉魯斯屬的任何魚類。
The lesson introduced pandora as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了潘朵拉作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 窗戶、門等處的一塊 玻璃 。
sentences: We need doubling glazing as this window pane lets out lots of heat. 我們需要雙層玻璃，因為這個窗 窗格 會散發大量熱量。 我們需要雙層玻璃，因為窗玻璃會散發大量熱量。 我們需要雙層玻璃，因為這個窗戶能夠消耗大量熱量。
The term pane refers to An individual sheet of glass in a window, door, etc. 術語「窗格」是指窗戶、門等中的一塊 玻璃 。 術語「窗格」是指窗戶、門等中的一塊玻璃。術語「同樣」是指窗戶、門等的一塊玻璃。
The researchers conducted a panel discussion on global warming. 研究人員舉行了一場關於全球暖化的專家小組（控制板）討論。
The solar panel managing to provide enough electricity for house. 太陽能板（控制板）竟然能為房子提供充足的電力。

meaning: 突發的極度身體疼痛或痛苦；突然而短暫的痛苦感；陣痛。
sentences: The term pang refers to a paroxysm of extreme physical pain or anguish; a feeling of sudden and transitory agony; a throe. 「pang」一詞指的是突發的極度身體疼痛或痛苦。突然而短暫的痛苦感；一陣陣陣痛。
The lesson introduced pang as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「pang」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Please try to stay calm and do not panic during an emergency. 請試著保持冷靜，緊急情況下不要恐慌。
The news of the sudden crisis caused a sense of panic in the city. 突然危機的消息在城市中引起了一種恐慌感。

meaning: 整個週邊地區的一覽無遺的景色。
sentences: The term panorama refers to an unbroken view of an entire surrounding area. 全景一詞是指整個周圍區域的完整視野。
The lesson introduced panorama as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了全景作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 屬於或關於全景的；視野開闊。
sentences: Something described as panoramic is of or pertaining to a panorama; with a wide view. 被描述為全景的事物屬於全景或與全景有關；視野開闊。
The word panoramic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 全景一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。
The runners were panting for breath after the race. 跑者們在比賽結束後氣喘吁吁。
She reached the top of the stairs, panting heavily. 她走到樓梯頂端，大口喘著氣。
The term pantheon refers to a temple dedicated to all the gods. 萬神殿一詞指的是供奉所有神的寺廟。
The lesson introduced pantheon as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了萬神殿這個術語，它是一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 任何有黑色毛皮的大型貓科動物；尤其是非洲和亞洲的黑毛豹。
sentences: The term panther refers to any of various big cats with black fur; most especially, the black-coated leopard of Africa and Asia. 黑豹一詞指的是各種具有黑色皮毛的大型貓科動物。尤其是非洲和亞洲的黑毛豹。
The lesson introduced panther as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了“豹”這個易於理解的有用術語。
Please relax your pantomime before starting the exercise. 開始運動前，請先放鬆你的pantomime。
He hurt his pantomime during basketball practice. 他在打籃球時弄傷了pantomime。
The pantry was filled with canned goods and dry food. 食品儲藏室堆滿了罐頭和乾糧。
She went to the pantry to find some crackers. 她去食品儲藏室找了一些餅乾。
I like to wear comfortable pants when I'm working at home. 我在家工作時喜歡穿舒服的褲子。
She bought a pair of black pants at the clothing store. 她在服裝店買了一條黑長褲。

meaning: 一枚古老的義大利銀幣。
sentences: The term paolo refers to an old Italian silver coin. 保羅一詞指的是一種古老的義大利銀幣。
The lesson introduced paolo as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「paolo」這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 爸爸，爸爸，爸爸；對父親的熟悉或老式的稱呼。
sentences: The term papa refers to dad, daddy, father; a familiar or old-fashioned term of address to one’s father. 爸爸這個字是指爸爸，爸爸，爸爸；對父親的一種熟悉的或老式的稱呼。
The lesson introduced papa as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「爸爸」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 教宗的辦公室，羅馬天主教會的領袖。
sentences: The Vatican defends the primacy of the papacy. 梵蒂岡捍衛教皇的首要地位。
The term papacy refers to the office of the pope of Rome, who is the head of the Roman Catholic Church. 教宗一詞指的是羅馬教宗的職位，他是羅馬天主教會的領袖。

meaning: 與教皇或羅馬教皇有關。
sentences: Something described as papal is having to do with the pope or the papacy. 被描述為教皇的事物與教皇或教皇權有關。
The word papal is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 教皇這個詞經常被用來描述一個人、一件事或一種情況。
Papaya is a tropical fruit that is rich in Vitamin C and fiber. 木瓜是一種富含維生素 C 和纖維的熱帶水果。
Taiwanese papayas are very sweet and juicy, and everyone loves them. 台灣的木瓜又甜又多汁，每個人都喜歡。
Please write your name and address on this piece of paper. 請在這張紙上寫下你的姓名和地址。
The printer is out of paper; I need to add some more. 印表機沒紙了，我需要再加一點。
The novel was first published in hardback and then in a cheaper paperback. 這部小說首先以精裝本出版，然後推出了更便宜的平裝本。
I prefer reading paperbacks because they are lighter and easier to carry. 我更喜歡讀平裝書，因為它們更輕且方便攜帶。
The term paprika refers to A variety of the spice. 辣椒粉一詞是指各種香料。
We learned the meaning of paprika during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了辣椒粉的意思。

meaning: 奧斯曼/土耳其和南斯拉夫地區多個國家的前貨幣子單位。
sentences: The term para refers to a former subunit of currency in several countries in the Ottoman/Turkish and Yugoslav regions. 帕拉一詞是指奧斯曼/土耳其和南斯拉夫地區幾個國家的前貨幣子單位。
The lesson introduced para as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 para 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 透過比較或類比來說明教訓（通常是宗教/道德）的簡短敘述。
sentences: In the New Testament the parables told by Jesus Christ convey His message, as in "The parable of the prodigal son". 在新約聖經中，耶穌基督講的比喻傳達了祂的信息，如「浪子的比喻」。
Catholic homilies normally draw on at least one Biblical lecture, often parables. 天主教的講道通常至少引用一篇聖經講座，通常是寓言。
She overcame her fear of heights by going on a parachute jump. 她透過跳降落傘（降落傘）克服了恐高症。
The pilot managed to eject and land safely with his parachute now. 飛行員現在竟然（設法）彈出並靠著降落傘安全降落。
The city hosts a colorful lantern parade every year for the festival. 這座城市每年都會為節日舉辦一場繽紛的燈會遊行。
The soldiers were trained to march in perfect sync during the parade. 士兵們接受訓練以便在閱兵期間步調完全一致地行進。

meaning: 包含共同元素的所有形式的集合，特別是單字或特定語法類別的所有屈折形式的集合。
sentences: The paradigm of "to sing" is "sing, sang, sung". The verb "to ring" follows the same paradigm. 「唱」的範式是「唱、唱、唱」。動詞「響鈴」遵循相同的範例。

The term paradigm refers to a set of all forms which contain a common element, especially the set of all inflectional forms of a word or a particular grammatical category. 術語範式是指包含共同元素的所有形式的集合，特別是單字或特定語法類別的所有屈折形式的集合。
The natural beauty of the island is truly a piece of paradise. 該島的自然美景簡直是人間天堂。
The quiet and quiet beach was a perfect paradise for relaxation. 那個安靜的沙灘是放鬆身心的完美天堂。
It is a strange paradox that the richest countries often have the most poverty. 最富有的國家往往貧困問題最嚴重，這真是一個奇怪的悖論。
The author's story explores the complex paradoxes of human behavior. 作者的故事探討了人類行為中複雜的矛盾（悖論）。

meaning: 以一種矛盾的方式；從而製造出一個悖論。
sentences: The proliferation of labor-saving devices has not given us more leisure time, paradoxically. 矛盾的是，節省勞力的設備的普及並沒有為我們帶來更多的閒暇時間。

If there exists a non-empty set of uninteresting natural numbers, there must be a smallest uninteresting number, but this number is paradoxically interesting because it is the smallest uninteresting number. 如果存在一組非空的無趣自然數，則一定存在一個最小的無趣數，但這個數卻矛盾地有趣，因為它是最小的無趣數。

meaning: 一個同伴；一場比賽；平等的。
sentences: The term paragon refers to a companion; a match; an equal. 典範一詞指的是同伴；一場比賽；一個平等的。
The lesson introduced paragon as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 paragon 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The teacher asked the students to read the following paragraph. 老師要求學生朗讀下列段落（段落）。
Please write a brief paragraph about your professional goals now. 請現在寫一段關於妳職業目標的簡短文字。
The two roads run parallel to each other for several miles through the woods. 兩條路並排（平行）穿過森林，延伸了數英里。
The research findings show a striking parallel with earlier studies on the topic. 研究結果與早先關於該主題的研究有著顯著的相似之處。
The accident resulted in a permanent paralysis of his legs. 事故導致他雙腿永久性癱瘓。
The news caused a total paralysis of the transportation system. 這個消息導致交通系統完全癱瘓。
The injury he sustained in the accident might permanently paralyze him. 他在事故中受的傷可能會使他永久癱瘓。
The sudden economic crisis threatened to paralyze the entire country. 突然的經濟危機威脅要使整個國家陷入癱瘓（麻痺）。

meaning: 在橢圓和雙曲線中，三分之一與任何直徑及其共軛成正比，或在拋物線中，與任何橫座標和相應的縱座標成比例。
sentences: The parameter of the principal axis of a conic section is called the latus rectum. 圓錐曲線的主軸參數稱為直腸緯度。

The term parameter refers to in the ellipse and hyperbola, a third proportional to any diameter and its conjugate, or in the parabola, to any abscissa and the corresponding ordinate. 術語「參數」是指在橢圓和雙曲線中，與任何直徑及其共軛成比例的三分之一，或在拋物線中，與任何橫座標和相應的縱座標成比例。

meaning: 以軍事方式訓練和組織的一群平民，但並不代表主權國家的正式部隊。
sentences: The term paramilitary refers to a group of civilians trained and organized in a military fashion, but which do not represent the formal forces of a sovereign power. 準軍事一詞是指以軍事方式訓練和組織的一群平民，但並不代表主權國家的正式部隊。
The lesson introduced paramilitary as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了準軍事作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Getting those credit cards paid off is paramount. 還清這些信用卡是至關重要的。
Something described as paramount is of the highest importance. 被描述為最重要的事物是最重要的。

meaning: 對他人極度、非理性的不信任。
sentences: The term paranoia refers to extreme, irrational distrust of others. 偏執一詞指的是對他人的極端、非理性的不信任。
The lesson introduced paranoia as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了偏執狂這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 屬於、與臨床偏執有關或患有臨床偏執。
sentences: Something described as paranoid is of, related to, or suffering from clinical paranoia. 被描述為偏執狂的事物屬於臨床偏執狂、與臨床偏執狂相關或患有臨床偏執狂。
The word paranoid is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 偏執這個詞經常被用來描述一個人、一件事或一種情況。

meaning: 超自然現象的統稱：一切超自然現象；具有超自然現象的事物。
sentences: Our next guest has spent a 40-year career studying the paranormal, and he has some thoughts he wants to share with our audience tonight. 我們的下一位嘉賓花了 40 年的時間研究超自然現象，他想與今晚的觀眾分享一些想法。
The term paranormal refers to paranormal phenomenona collectively: all things paranormal; things with paranormality. 超自然現像一詞是指超自然現象的統稱：一切超自然現象；具有超自然現象的事物。

meaning: 雜項，尤其是特定活動所需的一套設備。
sentences: He has an impressive collection of bicycling paraphernalia, but he doesn't ride very often anymore. 他收藏了令人印象深刻的自行車用品，但他不再經常騎車了。
The term paraphernalia refers to Miscellaneous items, especially the set of equipment required for a particular activity. 「用具」一詞是指雜項物品，尤其是特定活動所需的一套設備。

meaning: 用不同的詞語重述文本，通常是為了澄清含義或根據記憶而不是逐字重述。
sentences: The article included a brief paraphrase of the speech. 這篇文章包括對演講的簡短釋義。
The term paraphrase refers to A restatement of a text in different words, often to clarify meaning or from memory rather than verbatim. 釋義一詞是指用不同的字詞對文本進行重述，通常是為了澄清意義或根據記憶而不是逐字重述。

meaning: 隔離式（FSDU）（獨立式顯示單元）。
sentences: parasite display 寄生虫展示
parasite stand 寄生虫站

meaning: 屬於或關於生物或像徵性寄生蟲。
sentences: Something described as parasitic is of or pertaining to a biological or symbolic parasite. 被描述為寄生蟲的東西屬於或屬於生物或像徵性寄生蟲。
The word parasitic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 寄生這個字常用來形容人、事物或情況。
I need to go to the post office to collect an important parcel. 我需要去郵局領取一個重要包裹。
The courier delivered a large parcel to our house this morning. 快遞員今天早上送了一個大包裹到我們家。

meaning: 由小牛、綿羊、山羊或其他動物的拋光皮製成的材料，用作書寫用紙。
sentences: The term parchment refers to material, made from the polished skin of a calf, sheep, goat or other animal, used like paper for writing. 羊皮紙一詞是指由小牛、綿羊、山羊或其他動物的拋光皮膚製成的材料，用作書寫用紙。
The lesson introduced parchment as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了羊皮紙這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
I beg your pardon? I didn't quite hear what you said earlier. 請再說一遍好嗎？我剛才沒聽太清楚妳說什麼。
The president granted a full pardon to the political prisoner. 總統給予了那名政治犯全面的赦免。
Spending time with parents is very important for children. 與父母共度時光對孩子來說非常重要。
They are very proud of their parents' achievements. 他們為父母的成就感到非常自豪。
My parents are both teachers and they work very hard. 我的父母都是老師，他們工作非常努力。
It's important to respect and listen to your parents. 尊重並傾聽父母的意見很重要。
The report highlights the importance of parental support for students. 報告強調了父母支持對學生的重要性。
They requested parental permission for the field trip. 他們請求父母准許參加實地考察。
The term parenthood refers to the state of being a parent. 父母身份一詞是指為人父母的狀態。
The lesson introduced parenthood as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「父母身分」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The term parish refers to the community attending that church; the members of the parish. 教區一詞是指參加教堂的社區；教區成員。
The lesson introduced parish as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了教區作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 具有所有元素屬於兩個不相交子集之一的屬性的集合，尤其是分為偶數和奇數元素的子集的一組整數。
sentences: Parity is always preserved in such operations. 在此類操作中始終保留奇偶校驗。

The term parity refers to a set with the property of having all of its elements belonging to one of two disjoint subsets, especially a set of integers split in subsets of even and odd elements. 術語「奇偶校驗」是指具有其所有元素屬於兩個不相交子集之一的屬性的集合，尤其是分成偶數和奇數元素的子集的整數集合。
We spent the afternoon having a picnic in the park. 我們下午在公園裡野餐度過。
Central Park is one of the most famous landmarks in New York. 中央公園是紐約最著名的地標之一。
The term parker refers to someone who parks a motor vehicle. 「停車者」一詞是指停放機動車輛的人。
The lesson introduced parker as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「帕克」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Is there any free parking nearby? 附近有免費停車位嗎？
The parking area was full, so we had to find another spot. 停車場滿了，所以我們不得不找另一個位置。

meaning: 具有景觀中間帶的分隔式高速公路。
sentences: As they cruised, she remembered the old saw: Why do we drive on a parkway and park in a driveway? 當他們巡遊時，她想起了那句老話：為什麼我們要在公園大道上行駛並在車道上停車？
The term parkway refers to a divided highway with a landscaped median. 公園大道一詞是指帶有景觀中線的分隔式高速公路。
The new law was passed by a majority of members in the parliament. 新法案獲得了議會大多數成員的通過。
The parliament buildings are among the most historic sites in the city. 議會大樓是該市最歷史悠久的遺址之一。

meaning: 屬於議會或與議會有關的；贊成設立議會。
sentences: a parliamentarian democracy; the parliamentarian movement 議會民主制；議會運動
The report describes the result as parliamentarian. 報告描述了議員的結果。

meaning: 議會的、與議會有關的或由議會頒布的。
sentences: Parliamentary procedures are sometimes slow. 議會程序有時很慢。
The report describes the result as parliamentary. 報告將結果描述為議會結果。
They gathered in the front parlor to have tea. 他們在前面的客廳裡喝茶。
He works as a barber in a small local parlor. 他在當地一家小理髮店工作。

meaning: 以帕瑪森起司風格烹調的菜餚。
sentences: The local pub was offering a chicken parma and a pot of beer for $8. 當地的酒吧提供一份帕爾馬雞肉和一罐啤酒，價格為 8 美元。
The term parma refers to A dish cooked in the parmigiana style. 帕瑪一詞是指以帕瑪森起司風格烹調的菜餚。

meaning: 其特點是簡單地關注當地問題而排除更廣泛的背景；範圍或前景基本。
sentences: The use of simple, primary colors in the painting gave it a parochial feel. 這幅畫中簡單的原色的使用給人一種狹隘的感覺。
Some people in the United States have been accused of taking a parochial view, of not being interested in international matters. 美國一些人被指責觀點狹隘，對國際事務不感興趣。

meaning: 以嘲笑或諷刺的方式模仿另一部作品或表演的作品或表演。
sentences: The term parody refers to a work or performance that imitates another work or performance with ridicule or irony. 戲仿一詞是指以嘲笑或諷刺的方式模仿另一部作品或表演的作品或表演。
The lesson introduced parody as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了戲仿作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 口號或暗語；僅授予軍官的密碼，與授予所有警衛的口令不同。
sentences: The term parole refers to a watchword or code phrase; a password given only to officers, distinguished from the countersign, which is given to all guards. 術語「parole」是指口令或暗語；僅授予軍官的密碼，與授予所有警衛的口令不同。
The lesson introduced parole as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了假釋這個易於理解的有用術語。
The colorful parrot was repeating everything its owner said. 那隻繽紛的鸚鵡正重複著主人說的每一句話。
Parrots are known for their high intelligence and vocal abilities. 鸚鵡以其高智商和語言模仿能力聞名。

meaning: 防禦或偏轉動作；招架行為。
sentences: The term parry refers to a defensive or deflective action; an act of parrying. 招架一詞是指防禦或偏轉動作；一種招架行為。
The lesson introduced parry as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「招架」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一種亮綠色的二年生草本植物，Petroselinum Criscum，有許多品種。
sentences: The term parsley refers to a bright green, biennial herb, Petroselinum crispum, having many cultivars. 歐芹一詞指的是一種亮綠色的二年生草本植物，Petroselinum Criscum，有許多品種。
The lesson introduced parsley as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了歐芹這個易於理解的有用術語。
Our teacher wrote down parsnip with the note "歐洲蘿蔔". 我們老師把 parsnip 記下來，並註記「歐洲蘿蔔」。
We practiced using parsnip in two different sentences. 我們練習把 parsnip 放進兩個不同句子裡。
This is the most interesting part of the entire book. 這是整本書中最有趣的部分。
They are planning to take part in the international competition. 他們正計劃參加這項國際競賽。

meaning: 取得一份或一部分。 [與 of 或 in]。
sentences: Will you partake of some food? 你會吃一些食物嗎？
To partake means to take a share or portion. [with of or in]. 參與意味著分享或部分。 [與或在]。
The results of the study provided a partial answer to the issue. 研究結果為該問題提供了一個部分（部分的）答案。
I am quite partial to classical music and traditional art today. 我今天相當偏愛（部分的，指偏愛）古典音樂與傳統藝術。

meaning: 在部分程度上或程度，不完全。
sentences: If someone acts partially, they do so in a way that is to a partial degree or extent, incompletely. 如果某人採取部分行動，則他們的行為方式在某種程度上或程度是不完全的。
The speaker responded partially during the discussion. 發言者在討論中做出了部分回應。
All participants in the study were required to sign a formal consent form. 研究的所有參與者都被要求簽署正式的同意書。
The marathon attracted several thousand participants from all over the world. 馬拉松吸引了來自世界各地的數千名參與者。
Every student is encouraged to participate in the school sports meet. 鼓勵每位學生參加學校運動會。
They decided to participate in the international scientific conference. 他們決定參加這場國際科學會議。
Parental participation is crucial for the success of children now. 父母的參與對於現今孩子的成功至關重要。
The organization aims to promote public participation in politics. 該組織旨在推廣大眾參與政治。
The instructions were participial, so everyone finished quickly. 說明很participial，所以大家很快就完成了。
The nurse gave a participial answer during the meeting. 護理師在會議中給出了一個很participial的回答。
Mia wrote down participle with the note "分詞". Mia把 participle 記下來，並註記「分詞」。
We practiced using participle in two different sentences. 我們練習把 participle 放進兩個不同句子裡。
The scientist studied the behavior of subatomic particles in the laboratory. 科學家在實驗室研究了亞原子粒子的行為。
There was not a single particle of truth in his long and complex story. 他那冗長的故事中沒有一絲一毫（極小量）的真理。
She is very particular about the quality of the tea she drinks. 她對茶的品質非常講究。
This particular species of bird is only found on this tropical island. 這種特別的鳥類僅在該熱帶島嶼上被發現。
Please particularize the message before noon. 請在中午前particularize訊息。
Mia particularized the message carefully yesterday. Mia昨天仔細地particularize了訊息。
The apéritifs were particularly stimulating. 開胃酒特別刺激。
If someone acts particularly, they do so in a way that is especially, extremely. 如果某人的行為特別，那麼他們會以特別、極端的方式這樣做。
Our team partings this step whenever a problem appears. 每當出現問題時，我們團隊都會parting這個步驟。
The guide partinged the design carefully yesterday. 導覽員昨天仔細地parting了設計。

meaning: 擁護某個黨派或派別；尤其是具有盲目、狂熱或不合理地擁護政黨的性格。
sentences: They were blinded by partisan zeal. 他們被黨派狂熱蒙蔽了雙眼。

Something described as partisan is adherent to a party or faction; especially, having the character of blind, passionate, or unreasonable adherence to a party. 被描述為黨派的事物是指擁護某個黨派或派別；尤其是具有盲目、狂熱、無理地擁護政黨的性格。

meaning: 有黨派傾向或有偏見；偏袒。
sentences: The term partisanship refers to An inclination to be partisan or biased; partiality. 黨派一詞是指有黨派傾向或有偏見；偏袒。
We learned the meaning of partisanship during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了黨派之爭的涵義。

meaning: 將一事物分成部分或將一事物與另一事物分開的動作。
sentences: the partitions of Poland 波蘭的瓜分
The term partition refers to an action which divides a thing into parts, or separates one thing from another. 術語「分割」是指將事物分成部分或將一個事物與另一個事物分開的動作。

meaning: 劃分為分區的行為或結果；分區的排列。
sentences: The term partitioning refers to The act or result of dividing into partitions; an arrangement of partitions. 術語「分區」是指劃分為分區的行為或結果；分區的排列。
We learned the meaning of partitioning during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了分區的含義。
The project's success was partly due to his hard work and dedication. 專案的成功部分歸功於他的努力和奉獻。
I partly agree with your opinion, but I have some reservations as well. 我在一定程度上同意你的看法，但也有一些保留。
Trust and communication are essential for a successful business partner. 信任與溝通對於成功的生意夥伴至關重要。
She discussed her future plans with her husband and life partner. 她與丈夫及人生伴侶討論了未來的計畫。
Trust and communication are the foundations of a good partnership. 信任與溝通是良好合夥（夥伴）關係的基礎。

meaning: 支付僱員工資或薪水的星期或月份的某一天或特定的一天。
sentences: The term payday refers to the day of the week or month, or the specific day, on which an employee's wages or salary is paid. 發薪日一詞是指支付僱員工資或薪水的一周或一個月中的某一天或特定的一天。

meaning: 一個付錢的人；具體來說，是已經或應該支付帳單或票據的人。
sentences: The company is the largest tax payer in the region. 該公司是該地區最大的納稅人。

The colorful peacock displayed its magnificent feathers in the sun. 彩色的孔雀在陽光下展示其華麗的羽毛。

The children enjoyed throwing small pebbles into the calm mountain lake. 孩子們喜歡往平靜的山湖裡扔小石子。

meaning: 教學策略或方法；他們的學習與發展；一種教育理念。
sentences: The term pedagogy refers to the strategies or methods of instruction; their study and development; an educational philosophy. 教育學一詞是指教學策略或方法；他們的學習和發展；一種教育理念。

meaning: 受人尊敬或尊敬的地方。
sentences: He has put his mother on a pedestal. You can't say a word against her. 他把他的母親捧為神壇。你不能對她說半句話。

meaning: 一個人的祖先歷史；血統，血統。

sentences: The term penance refers to A sacrament in some Christian churches that involves penitence (remorse plus restitution via prayer). 懺悔一詞是指一些基督教教堂中涉及懺悔（悔恨加上透過祈禱恢復原狀）的聖禮。

meaning: 性交過程中陰莖（或類似物體）的插入。

meaning: 一個或多個半島的、屬於、類似或與之相關的。

meaning: 關押已定罪重罪犯的州或聯邦監獄；一座監獄。
sentences: The term penitentiary refers to a state or federal prison for convicted felons; a prison. 監獄一詞是指關押已定罪重罪犯的州或聯邦監獄；一座監獄。

meaning: 比賽的勝利，以旗幟為代表。
sentences: The New York Yankees have won the American League pennant far more often than any other team. 紐約洋基隊贏得美國聯盟錦旗的次數遠多於其他任何球隊。
The term pennant refers to The winning of a competition, represented by a flag. 三角旗一詞指的是比賽的勝利，以旗幟為代表。

In a functioning digital economy, being cashless is far different from being penniless, because cash is merely one form of money; but some preppers hoard gold in case the system gets destroyed and cashlessness suddenly becomes pennilessness. 在正常運作的數位經濟中，無現金與身無分文有很大不同，因為現金只是貨幣的一種形式；但一些末日準備者囤積黃金，以防系統被破壞，無現金突然變成身無分文。
I don't have a single penny in my pocket right now, unfortunately. 我現在口袋裡真的一分錢都沒有，真倒霉。
Every penny counts when you are trying to save for a big goal. 當妳試圖為一個大目標存錢時，每一分錢都很重要。
My grandfather receives a monthly pension from the government after retiring. 我祖父退休後每個月領取政府發放的養老金（退休金）。
It is important to start planning for your pension early to ensure security. 儘早規劃養老金對於確保保障至關重要。

meaning: 在某物上形成庇護所或天篷的東西；遮陽篷、避難所等。
sentences: The term penthouse refers to something forming a shelter or canopy over something; an awning, shelter, etc. 閣樓一詞指的是某物上形成庇護所或天篷的東西；遮陽篷、避難所等

The soup has a very spicy taste because of the red chili peppers. 因為紅辣椒，這湯的味道非常辣。

meaning: 任何含有薄荷草萃取物的各種糖果；薄荷糖果。
sentences: The term peppermint refers to any of various sweets containing extract of the peppermint herb; peppermint confectionery. 術語「薄荷」是指任何含有薄荷草萃取物的各種糖果；薄荷糖果。
The lesson introduced peppermint as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了薄荷作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一種辛辣薩拉米風格的意大利美式香腸，由醃製豬肉和牛肉製成，並用胡椒調味。
sentences: The term pepperoni refers to A spicy salami -style Italian-American sausage made from cured pork and beef seasoned with pepper. 義大利辣香腸一詞指的是一種辛辣的薩拉米式義大利美式香腸，由醃製豬肉和牛肉製成，並用胡椒調味。
We learned the meaning of pepperoni during today's lesson. 我們在今天的課程中學習了義大利辣香腸的含義。
The engineer wrote down peppers with the note "燈籠椒". 工程師把 peppers 記下來，並註記「燈籠椒」。
We practiced using peppers in two different sentences. 我們練習把 peppers 放進兩個不同句子裡。

meaning: 性能增強藥物，通常是合成勝肽化合物。
sentences: The term peptide refers to performance-enhancing drugs, often a synthetic peptide compound. 肽一詞是指提高成績的藥物，通常是合成的肽化合物。
The lesson introduced peptide as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了勝肽作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The cost of the tour is one hundred dollars per person. 旅行的花費是每人一百美元。
The car was traveling at a speed of sixty miles per hour. 車子正以每小時六十英里的速度行駛。
She began to perceive a subtle change in his attitude towards the project. 她開始感覺到他對專案的態度發生了微妙的變化。
It is interesting to see how different people perceive the same situation. 看看不同的人如何感知（看待）同一情況是很有趣的。
The economist predicted a ten percent increase in the inflation. 經濟學家預測通膨率會上升百分之（百分比）十。
Ninety percent of students in the class passed the final exam now. 班上現在有百分之九十的學生通過了期末考試。
The study aims to measure the percentage of forest cover in area. 該研究旨在測量該地區森林覆蓋的百分比。
There has been a significant percentage increase in profit lately. 利潤最近有了顯著的百分比增長。

meaning: 如此分割的一百個團體中的任何一個。
sentences: She is highly intelligent—she has an IQ in the top percentile. 她非常聰明——她的智商處於最高百分位。
The term percentile refers to Any one of the hundred groups so divided. 術語「百分位數」是指如此分割的一百個組別中的任何一個。
The report aims to change the public perception of the new policy. 該報告旨在改變公眾對新政策的看法（觀點）。
He has a very keen perception of human behavior and motivation. 他對人類行為和動機有著敏銳的洞察力（感知）。
She is a very perceptive analyst who understands the market well. 她是一位敏銳的分析師，非常了解市場。
He made a perceptive observation about the situation. 他對情況做出了敏銳的觀察。
The bird sat on its high perch and sang a beautiful song this morning. 鳥兒停在高處的棲枝上，今晨唱起了一首優美的歌。
The small mountain cottage is perched on a cliff overlooking the valley. 那座山間小木屋坐落在（棲息在）俯瞰山谷的懸崖上。

meaning: 兩個物體碰撞產生聲音。
sentences: The term percussion refers to the collision of two bodies in order to produce a sound. 術語“打擊樂”是指兩個物體碰撞以產生聲音。
The lesson introduced percussion as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了打擊樂作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一次又一次地出現或重複出現；經常性的。
sentences: a perennial candidate in elections 選舉中的常年候選人
Change is a perennial theme in politics. 變革是政治中永恆的主題。
It was a perfect sunny day for a picnic in the park. 真是個適合在公園野餐的完美晴天。
She has a perfect command of the English language and literature. 她對英語與文學的掌握非常完美。
She is a true perfectionist who always strives for perfection now. 她是一位現在總是在追求完美的（完美）真正完美主義者。
The sunset was so beautiful that it managing to be absolute perf. 日落如此美麗，簡直達到了（完美）絕對的完美境界。
Their performance was perfectly fine. 他們的表現非常好。
If someone acts perfectly, they do so in a way that is wholly, completely, totally. 如果一個人表現完美，他就會以一種完全、完全、完全的方式做到這一點。
The talented actors will perform a classic play at the theater. 有才華的演員們將在劇院演出一部經典劇作。
Modern robots are programmed to perform highly repetitive tasks. 現代機器人被編程以執行高度重複性的任務。
The leading actress gave a brilliant performance in the new movie. 女主角在新電影中展現了精湛的演出。
The company's performance has improved significantly this quarter. 公司的業績（表現）在本季度有了顯著提升。
The stage was crowded with talented performers from all over the world. 舞台上擠滿了來自世界各地的天才表演者。
She is a top performer in her sales team and consistently achieves her goals. 她是銷售團隊中的佼佼者（執行者），始終達成目標。
She wore a sophisticated perfume with a very pleasant flower scent. 她噴了一款帶著宜人花香的精緻香水。
The store sells a wide variety of expensive international perfumes. 這家店銷售各式各樣昂貴的國際香水。
Perhaps we can meet for coffee tomorrow afternoon. 也許我們明天下午可以見面喝杯咖啡。
Perhaps it was a mistake to leave the office so early. 也許這麼早離開辦公室是一個錯誤。
The sailors faced great peril during the violent storm at sea last night. 船員們在昨晚海上的激烈風暴中面臨著巨大的危險。
We must all understand the peril of climate change for our future. 我們都必須了解氣候變遷對我們未來的威脅（險境）。

meaning: 物體所有邊長的距離總和。
sentences: The term perimeter refers to the sum of the distance of all the lengths of the sides of an object. 週長一詞是指物體所有邊長的距離總和。
The lesson introduced perimeter as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了周長作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The historical period of the Renaissance was an age of discovery. 文藝復興這一歷史時期是一個探索的時代。
Students are required to attend all classes during the school period. 學生被要求在校期間參加所有課程。

meaning: 與碘的最高氧化態有關；屬於或衍生自高碘酸。
sentences: Something described as periodic is relating to the highest oxidation state of iodine; of or derived from a periodic acid. 被描述為週期性的東西與碘的最高氧化態有關；屬於或衍生自高碘酸。
The word periodic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 週期性一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 定期發行的出版物，但頻率低於每日。
sentences: The term periodical refers to a publication issued regularly, but less frequently than daily. 期刊一詞是指定期發行但頻率低於每日的出版物。
The lesson introduced periodical as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了期刊作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 以有規律或週期性的方式。
sentences: If someone acts periodically, they do so in a way that is in a manner that is regular or periodic. 如果某人週期性地行動，他們就會以有規律或週期性的方式這樣做。
The speaker responded periodically during the discussion. 發言者在討論期間定期回應。
Something described as peripheral is on the periphery or boundary. 被描述為外圍的東西是在外圍或邊界上。
The word peripheral is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 外圍一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 某事物的外部邊界、部分或表面。
sentences: The suburbs are a city's periphery. 郊區是城市的外圍。
The term periphery refers to the outside boundary, parts or surface of something. 術語「外圍」是指某物的外部邊界、部分或表面。
Many species of animals will perish if their natural habitats are destroyed. 如果自然棲息地遭到破壞，許多動物物種將會滅絕（滅亡）。
Fresh fruit and vegetables will quickly perish if they are not stored well. 新鮮水果和蔬菜如果保存不當，會很快枯萎（變質）。

meaning: 故意在宣誓後提供虛假或誤導性證詞。
sentences: We declare under penalty of perjury that the foregoing is true and correct. 我們聲明上述內容真實且正確，如有偽證，願受處罰。
The term perjury refers to the deliberate giving of false or misleading testimony under oath. 偽證一詞是指在宣誓後故意提供虛假或誤導性證詞。
Free coffee is one of the perks of the job. 免費咖啡是這份工作的 福利 之一。 免費咖啡是這份工作的福利之一。 免費咖啡是這份工作的福利之一。
The term perk refers to Perquisite. 術語「福利」指的是 福利 。 Perk 這個字指的是 Perquisite。 術語“福利”是指福利。

meaning: 使用熱量、化學物質等來燙髮。
sentences: To perm means to give hair a perm, using heat, chemicals etc. 燙髮是指使用熱量、化學物質等對頭髮進行燙髮。
People may perm in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下燙髮。
The doctor said that the medical condition might be permanent now. 醫生說這種病況現在可能是永久性的（永恆的）。
They decided to move to Japan and seek a permanent residence now. 他們決定移居日本，並現在尋求永久居留權。
If someone acts permanently, they do so in a way that is in a permanent manner; lastingly. 如果某人的行為是永久的，那麼他們會以永久的方式這樣做；持久地。
The speaker responded permanently during the discussion. 演講者在討論過程中不斷回應。
The use of dictionaries is not permissible during the final examination. 考試期間不允許（不可）使用字典。
Is it permissible to park your car here for a short period of time? 這裡可以（許可）短時間停車嗎？
You must seek permission from the manager before you leave. 妳離開前必須徵得經理的許可。
She was granted permission to travel abroad for the project. 她被批准為了該專案而出國出差。
The new license will permit you to drive a car legally. 這張新執照將允許妳合法開車。
Please ensure that you have a valid permit before you start work. 請確保您在開始工作前擁有有效的許可證。

meaning: 以微妙的方式造成很大的傷害。
sentences: They warned of the pernicious effects of misinformation. 他們警告錯誤訊息的有害影響。
The weed has a pernicious influence on local crops. 這種雜草對當地農作物有有害影響。

meaning: 過氧化氫，尤其是在水溶液中用作漂白劑時。
sentences: The term peroxide refers to hydrogen peroxide, especially when in an aqueous solution used as a bleach. 過氧化物一詞是指過氧化氫，尤其是當在水溶液中用作漂白劑時。
The lesson introduced peroxide as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了過氧化氫作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The two lines on the graph are perpendicular to each other. 圖表上的兩條線彼此垂直。
She drew a perpendicular line from the top of the triangle. 她從三角形頂端畫了一條垂線。

meaning: 犯下罪行的人；特別是犯下罪行或犯罪的人。
sentences: perpetrator of violence 暴力肇事者
The term perpetrator refers to one who perpetrates; especially, one who commits an offence or crime. 「犯罪者」一詞是指實施犯罪的人；特別是犯下罪行或犯罪的人。

meaning: 設定為無限期有效或擁有任期。
sentences: perpetual copyright 永久版權
Something described as perpetual is set up to be in effect or have tenure for an unlimited duration. 被描述為永久的東西被設定為有效或無限期地使用。

meaning: 似乎永無止境；不休;不斷地。
sentences: If someone acts perpetually, they do so in a way that is seeming to never end; endlessly; constantly. 如果某人的行為是永久的，那麼他們的行為方式似乎永無止境；不休;不斷地。
The speaker responded perpetually during the discussion. 演講者在討論過程中不斷回應。

meaning: 透過重複來延長（某物）的存在；加強。
sentences: To perpetuate means to prolong the existence of (something) by repetition; to reinforce. 永久化意味著透過重複來延長（某物）的存在；加強。
People may perpetuate in different situations depending on the context. 根據環境的不同，人們可能會在不同的情況下持續存在。
The mystery continues to perplex the investigators. 這個謎團繼續困惑著調查人員。
His strange behavior perplexes his friends and family. 他奇怪的行為讓親友感到費解。
He had a perplexed look on his face as he read the letter. 他讀信時臉上帶著困惑的神情。
She seemed perplexed by the complexity of the problem. 她似乎被問題的複雜程度困擾住了。
It was a perplexing puzzle that took hours to solve. 那是個令人費解的謎題，花了幾個小時才解開。
The results of the study were quite perplexing. 研究結果令人費解。
She stared at the map in total perplexity. 她完全困惑地盯著地圖看。
The situation was full of mystery and perplexity. 情況充滿了神祕與費解。

meaning: 由梨子製成的發酵酒精飲料，類似硬蘋果酒。
sentences: The term perry refers to a fermented alcoholic beverage made from pears, similar to hard apple cider. 梨酒一詞指的是一種由梨製成的發酵酒精飲料，類似硬蘋果酒。
The lesson introduced perry as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 perry 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 迫害，特別是迫害特定群體的行為；迫害實例。
sentences: Many apartheid perpetrators escaped prosecution for their persecution of black Africans and political dissidents. 許多種族隔離肇事者因迫害非洲黑人和政治異議人士而逃脫了起訴。
The term persecution refers to the act of persecuting, especially a specific group of people; an instance of persecution. 迫害一詞是指迫害，特別是針對特定人群的行為；迫害的例子。

meaning: 不顧灰心、反對或先前的失敗，繼續採取行動。
sentences: The term perseverance refers to continuing in a course of action without regard to discouragement, opposition or previous failure. 毅力一詞是指不顧灰心、反對或先前的失敗而繼續採取行動。
The lesson introduced perseverance as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「毅力」這個有用的術語，需要理解。
You must learn to persevere despite the difficulties and challenges you face. 儘管面臨困難與挑戰，你必須學會堅持不懈。
She decided to persevere with her research until she found the solution. 她決定持之以恆地進行研究，直到找到解決方案。
If the symptoms persist for more than three days, you should consult a doctor. 如果症狀持續超過三天，您應該諮詢醫生。
She decided to persist with her studies despite the difficulties she faced. 儘管面臨困難，她仍決定堅持學業。
Success in any field requires a high level of hard work and persistence. 在任何領域取得成功都需要高度的努力和堅持。
The manager was impressed by her persistence in solving the problem. 經理對她解決問題的毅力印象深刻。
The patient suffered from a persistent cough that lasted for several weeks. 病人患有持續數週的咳嗽。
She is a very persistent worker who never gives up on a difficult task. 她是一位非常有毅力（堅持不懈）的工作者，從不放棄困難的任務。
The small girl persistently asked her father to buy her the doll. 小女孩堅持要父親買娃娃給她。
If someone acts persistently, they do so in a way that is in a persistent manner. 如果有人堅持不懈地行事，他們就會以堅持不懈的方式這樣做。
He is a very kind and generous person who helps everyone. 他是個非常善良慷慨、幫助每個人的人。
The museum allows only ten persons to enter at a time. 這間博物館一次只允許十人進入。

meaning: 一個人呈現給世界的面具或外表。
sentences: He keeps his online persona completely separate from his real-world one. 他將自己的網路形象與現實世界完全分開。
The term persona refers to the mask or appearance one presents to the world. 角色一詞是指一個人呈現給世界的面具或外表。
Please keep these important personal documents in a safe place. 請將這些重要的個人文件放在安全的地方。
He decided to take a short leave from work for personal reasons. 他決定因個人原因請短假。
She has a very outgoing and friendly personality that everyone loves. 她性格開朗友善，每個人都喜歡。
Success in this field depends on both your skills and personality. 在這個領域的成功取決於你的技能與性格。
I'm really annoyed with her, personally. 就我個人而言，我真的很生氣她。
If someone acts personally, they do so in a way that is concerning oneself. 如果某人採取個人行動，他們會以與自己有關的方式行事。

meaning: 代表某種品質或思想的人、事物或名稱；實施例或例子。
sentences: Adolf Hitler was the personification of anti-Semitism. 阿道夫·希特勒是反猶太主義的化身。
The term personification refers to A person, thing, or name typifying a certain quality or idea; an embodiment or exemplification. 擬人一詞是指代表某種品質或想法的人、事物或名稱；實施例或例子。
The company is looking for experienced personnel to join its new research team. 公司正在尋找經驗豐富的人員加入其新的研究團隊。
Please contact the personnel department if you have any questions about your contract. 如果您對合約有任何疑問，請聯繫人事部門。
Traveling can help you gain a new perspective on different cultures and lifestyles. 旅遊可以幫助你對不同的文化和生活方式產生新的看法（觀點）。
From a historical perspective, the discovery was a major turning point. 從歷史的角度來看，這項發現是一個重大的轉折點。
I managed to persuade my friend to join the hiking club. 我成功說服（勸服）我的朋友加入了健行社。
It's difficult to persuade him to change his mind on this issue. 很難說服他改變對這個問題的看法。
It took a lot of persuasion to convince him to change his mind. 花了很大的功夫（勸說）才說服他改變主意。
She is a person of great persuasion and always gets what she wants. 她是一個極具說服力（勸說）的人，總能如願以償。
She gave a very persuasive presentation that impressed everyone now. 她做了一場現在給每個人都留下深刻印象的極具說服力（有說服力的）的簡報。
You should try to be more persuasive when presenting your ideas. 在陳述妳的想法時，妳應該努力變得更具說服力。

meaning: 屬於或作為零件、附屬物、屬性或配件連接。
sentences: That spare wheel pertains to this car. 那個備胎屬於這輛車。
People often pertain when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們往往會表示支持。

meaning: 對於（某個主題或事項）很重要；有關；相關的。
sentences: Something described as pertinent is important with regard to (a subject or matter); pertaining; relevant. 被描述為相關的事物對於（主題或事項）而言很重要；有關；相關的。
The word pertinent is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 相關這個詞常用來描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 貫穿始終；瀰漫、滲透、滲透或影響一切。
sentences: The smell of smoke was pervasive throughout the building. 整棟大樓都瀰漫著煙味。
Online advertising has become pervasive in daily life. 網路廣告已經滲透到日常生活的各個角落。

meaning: 反對某事時轉過身，與某事分離。
sentences: The report describes the result as perverse. 報告稱這一結果是反常的。
Everyone noticed the perverse tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的反常語氣。

meaning: 歪曲某人或某物的行為；屈辱;貶低。
sentences: The term perversion refers to The action of perverting someone or something; humiliation; debasement. 「變態」一詞指的是變態某人或某物的行為；屈辱;貶低。
We learned the meaning of perversion during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了變態的意思。

meaning: 腐敗；導致不真實；腐敗或其他不純潔的。
sentences: How could stopping someone from killing himself or herself "pervert the course of justice"? 阻止某人自殺怎麼可能「妨礙司法公正」？
To pervert means to corrupt; to cause to be untrue; corrupted or otherwise impure. 敗壞意味著腐敗；導致不真實；腐敗或其他不純淨的。

meaning: 煩人的、麻煩的、令人惱火的（通常是動物或孩子的）。
sentences: Stay out of my yard, you pesky kids! 你們這些討厭的孩子們，別靠近我的院子！
That pesky dog is barking again. 那隻討厭的狗又叫了。
There is a growing sense of pessimism about the country's economic future. 對國家經濟前景的悲觀情緒正在加劇。
Despite the challenges, she tried to avoid pessimism and stay positive. 儘管面臨挑戰，她仍努力避免悲觀，保持積極。
The pessimist explained the problem clearly to everyone. 這位pessimist清楚地向大家說明了問題。
We asked the pessimist for advice before making a decision. 我們在做決定前先向這位pessimist請教。
It's important to maintain a positive and not pessimistic attitude. 保持積極而非悲觀的（悲觀）態度是很重要的。
He has very pessimistic views on the future of the global economy. 他對全球經濟的未來有著非常悲觀的看法。
The farmer used organic pesticides to control the garden pests. 農夫使用有機殺蟲劑來防治花園害蟲。
Don't be such a pest; I'm trying to concentrate on my work now. 不要這麼討厭（害蟲，指煩人）；我現在正努力專心工作。
We have a pet dog named Max who loves to play in the park. 我們養了一隻叫 Max 的寵物狗，牠很喜歡在公園玩。
Keeping a pet can bring a lot of joy and companionship. 養寵物可以帶來很多快樂與陪伴。
The floor was covered with the colorful petals of the blooming flowers. 地板上鋪滿了盛開鮮花的繽紛花瓣。
The rose has soft and delicate petals. 玫瑰有著柔軟嬌嫩的花瓣。

meaning: 瑣碎，在不同的意義上：數量很少。不重要;便宜的;容易更換。小，小。次要；等級較低。
sentences: Something described as petit is petty, in its various senses: Few in number. Unimportant; cheap; easily replaced. Small, minor. Secondary; lower in rank. 被描述為“petit”的東西是指“微不足道”，有多種含義：數量很少。不重要;便宜的;容易更換。小，小。次要；等級較低。
The word petit is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. petit這個字常用來形容人、事物或情況。

meaning: 體積小；適合身材矮小的成年女性。
sentences: Something described as petite is of small size; intended for small-framed adult women. petite 形容某物尺寸較小；適合身材矮小的成年女性。
The word petite is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 嬌小這個詞常被用來形容人、事物或情況。
Thousands of people signed a petition demanding better public transportation. 數千人在要求改善公共交通的請願書上簽了名。
The students organized a petition to protest against the increase in tuition fees. 學生們組織了一場請願活動，抗議學費上漲。

meaning: 源自任何化石燃料的任何化學物質：石油、天然氣或煤炭。
sentences: As the prices of petroleum, natural gas, and coal fluctuate over the years, the petrochemical industry can to some extent switch feedstocks. 隨著石油、天然氣、煤炭等價格的歷年波動，石化產業可以在一定程度上轉換原料。
The term petrochemical refers to Any chemical derived from any of the fossil fuels: petroleum, natural gas, or coal. 術語石化產品是指從任何化石燃料衍生的任何化學物質：石油、天然氣或煤炭。
We need to stop at the gas station to get some petrol for the car. 我們需要在加油站停一下，給車加點汽油。
The price of petrol has increased significantly over the past few months. 汽油價格在過去幾個月裡顯著上漲。
Our teacher asked us to memorize "petrol station" for next week. 老師要我們把「petrol station」背起來，下週要用。
I heard "petrol station" in a podcast and wrote it in my notebook. 我在 Podcast 聽到「petrol station」，就把它記進筆記本。
The region is known for its vast natural resources, especially petroleum. 該地區以其豐富的自然資源而聞名，尤其是石油。
Petroleum is used to produce a wide variety of fuels and chemicals. 石油被用來生產各式各樣的燃料和化學品。
We shouldn't waste our time and energy on such petty arguments. 我們不應該在這種瑣碎的爭吵上浪費時間和精力。
He was accused of a petty crime and was released with a small fine. 他被指控犯有輕微（小的）罪行，並在繳納少量罰款後獲釋。
a phantom limb 幻肢
Something described as phantom is fictitious or nonexistent. 被描述為幻影的東西是虛構的或不存在的。
That is a pharmaceutical way to handle the details. 那是處理細節時很pharmaceutical的方法。
The feedback was clear and pharmaceutical. 這份回饋清楚而且pharmaceutical。
The pharmacist provided some advice on how to take the new medication. 藥劑師提供了關於如何服用新藥的建議。
She decided to become a pharmacist because she enjoys helping people. 她決定成為一名藥劑師，因為她喜歡幫助別人。

meaning: 給定藥物的特性和反應，特別是與其治療價值相關的特性和反應。
sentences: The term pharmacology refers to the properties and reactions of a given drug, especially with relation to its therapeutic value. 術語「藥理學」是指給定藥物的特性和反應，尤其是與其治療價值相關的特性和反應。
The lesson introduced pharmacology as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了藥理學，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
You can buy this type of medicine at any local pharmacy in the city. 您可以在市內任何一家當地藥局買到這類藥物。
He works as a senior manager for a large national pharmacy chain. 他在一家大型全國連鎖藥店擔任高級經理。

meaning: 咽，咽部。位於鼻腔與口腔後方、連接食道與氣管的區域。
sentences: The pharynx is part of both the digestive and respiratory systems. 咽部同時屬於消化系統和呼吸系統。
A throat infection can cause swelling in the pharynx. 喉嚨感染可能會造成咽部腫脹。
The project is currently in its final phase and is expected to finish soon. 該專案目前處於最後階段，預計很快就會完成。
Most children go through a difficult phase as they enter their teenage years. 大半孩子進入青少年時期都會經歷一段艱難的時期。
We saw several colorful pheasants in the woods this morning. 我們今早在森林裡看到幾隻色彩繽紛的野雞。
Roasted pheasant is a traditional dish in some cultures. 烤雉雞在某些文化中是一道傳統菜餚。

meaning: 非常了不起； highly extraordinary;驚人的。
sentences: phenomenal effort 非凡的努力
phenomenal musician 非凡的音樂家
The Northern Lights managing to be a magnificent natural phenomenon. 北極光竟然（能）是一幕壯麗的自然現象。
Climate change managed to become a major global phenomenon lately. 氣候變化最近竟然成了一個重大的全球現象。

meaning: 根據表型進行評估或分類。
sentences: To phenotype means to evaluate or classify based on phenotype. 表型意味著根據表型進行評估或分類。
People may phenotype in different situations depending on the context. 根據環境的不同，人們可能會在不同的情況下表現出不同的表型。

meaning: 用於表達緊張、疲勞或驚訝的緩解。
sentences: Phew, that took a long time to cook! 唷，煮了好久啊！
The word phew is used in English writing and speech. phew 這個字用於英語寫作和演講。
As public funding is reduced, we depend increasingly on private philanthropy. 隨著公共資金的減少，我們越來越依賴私人慈善事業。
The term philanthropy refers to charitable giving, charity. 慈善一詞指的是慈善捐贈、慈善事業。
Plato was a world-famous ancient Greek philosopher and teacher. 柏拉圖是一位世界聞名的古希臘哲學家與老師。
He is a leading moral philosopher who has written several books. 他是一位領先的道德哲學家，寫過幾本著作。
She has very philosophical views on the basic meaning of life today. 她對現今生命的根本意義有著非常具備哲學性（哲學的）的看法。
The researchers conducted a philosophical study on human nature now. 研究人員現在對人性進行了一項哲學研究。
She decided to study western philosophy and history at university. 她決定在大學攻讀西方哲學與歷史。
His personal philosophy manages to be based on kindness and honesty. 他的個人哲學竟然是基於善良與誠實。

meaning: 薩奧尼斯屬的幾種鳥類中的任何一種。
sentences: The term phoebe refers to any of several birds of the genus Sayornis. 菲比一詞指的是賽奧尼斯屬的幾種鳥類中的任何一種。
The lesson introduced phoebe as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了菲比這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 任何明顯被摧毀後重生的東西。
sentences: Astronomers believe planets might form in this dead star's disk, like the mythical Phoenix rising up out of the ashes. 天文學家相信行星可能會在這顆死亡恆星的圓盤中形成，就像神話中的鳳凰從灰燼中崛起一樣。
The term phoenix refers to anything that is reborn after apparently being destroyed. 鳳凰這個詞指的是任何在明顯被摧毀後重生的東西。
Please answer the phone; it's ringing! 請接電話；響了！
I'll phone you as soon as I arrive at the hotel. 我一到飯店就會打電話給你。

meaning: 與單字或名稱的口頭形式而不是書面形式相關，而不是正字法。
sentences: All unfamiliar names have been transcribed in phonetic spelling. 所有不熟悉的名字都被拼音記錄下來。
Something described as phonetic is relating to the spoken rather than written form of a word or name, as opposed to orthographic. 被描述為語音的東西與單字或名稱的口頭形式而不是書面形式有關，與正字法相反。

meaning: 欺詐；偽造的;具有誤導性的外表。
sentences: A good jeweler should be able to tell a real stone from a phony one. 優秀的珠寶商應該能夠區分真石和假石。
Something described as phony is fraudulent; fake; having a misleading appearance. 被描述為虛假的東西是欺詐性的；偽造的;具有誤導性的外觀。
The term phosphate refers to any salt or ester of phosphoric acid. 術語磷酸鹽是指磷酸的任何鹽或酯。
The lesson introduced phosphate as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了磷酸鹽作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
She took a lot of photos during her holiday in Japan. 她在日本度假期間拍了很多照片。
Can you help me organize my photos in an album? 你能幫我把照片整理成相簿嗎？
The photocopier explained the problem clearly to everyone. 這位photocopier清楚地向大家說明了問題。
We asked the photocopier for advice before making a decision. 我們在做決定前先向這位photocopier請教。
Please make a photocopy of this document for me. 請幫我複印一份這份文件。
He is busy photocopying the handouts for the meeting. 他正忙著影印會議講義。
The sunbather developed a photogenic melanoma on her back. 這位日光浴者的背上長出了一個上鏡的黑色素瘤。
The report describes the result as photogenic. 報告稱這項結果非常上鏡。
She took a beautiful photograph of the sunset over the ocean. 她拍了一張絕美的海上日落照片。
I have a lot of photos of my family in this album. 這個相簿裡有很多我家庭的照片。
He works as a professional wildlife photographer for a magazine. 他擔任雜誌的專業野生動物攝影師。
The wedding photographer took some amazing photos of the couple. 婚禮攝影師為這對新人拍了一些很棒的照片。
The exhibition features a wide variety of photographic works from local artists. 展覽展出了當地藝術家各式各樣的攝影作品。
She has a photographic memory and can remember every detail of a page. 她擁有過目不忘的（照片般的）記憶力，能記住頁面上的每個細節。
She has a great passion for wildlife and nature photography now. 她現在對野生動物與自然攝影（攝影）有著極大的熱情。
Modern digital photography managed to change way we capture memory. 現代數位攝影竟然（能）改變了我們捕捉回憶的方式。

meaning: 暴露在光下時產生電壓。
sentences: Something described as photovoltaic is producing a voltage when exposed to light. 被描述為光伏的東西在暴露於光時會產生電壓。
The word photovoltaic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 光伏一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 四 成语的，习惯用语的
sentences: The app has a phrasal interface for new users. 這個 App 的介面對新手來說很phrasal。
Our teacher gave a phrasal answer during the meeting. 我們老師在會議中給出了一個很phrasal的回答。
Could you please explain the meaning of this English phrase? 你能解釋一下這個英文短語的意思嗎？
The novel is full of beautiful and hauntingly poetic phrases. 這部小說充滿了優美且令人難忘的詩意語句。

meaning: 屬於或與生物體的演化發展有關。
sentences: The report describes the result as phylogenetic. 該報告將這一結果描述為系統發育。
Everyone noticed the phylogenetic tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這個訊息的系統發育基調。
Regular physical exercise is essential for maintaining good health. 定期體能運動（身體的）對於保持健康至關重要。
The doctor performed a thorough physical examination of the patient. 醫生對病人進行了徹底的身體（身體的）檢查。

meaning: 直接地，而不是自動或類似地。
sentences: After the software updated, I had to go in and physically change all the settings back to the way I wanted them. 軟體更新後，我必須進去並將所有設定更改回我想要的方式。
If someone acts physically, they do so in a way that is directly, rather than automatically or similar. 如果某人採取身體行動，他們會以直接的方式而不是自動或類似的方式這樣做。
He works as a successful primary care physician in the city center. 他在市中心擔任成功的基層保健醫生。
Please consult a professional physician if your fever continues now. 如果妳現在持續發燒，請諮詢專業醫生。
Albert Einstein was a world-famous theoretical physicist of time. 阿爾伯特·愛因斯坦是他那個時代世界聞名的理論物理學家。
The researchers are working with leading physicists on project now. 研究人員現在正與領先的物理學家合作開展專案。
She decided to study physics and mathematics at a top university. 她決定在一所頂尖大學攻讀物理（物理）與數學。
The laws of physics manage to explain how objects move in universe. 物理定律竟然（能）解釋物體在宇宙中是如何運動的。

meaning: 自然物體的研究和描述；自然科學。
sentences: The term physiology refers to the study and description of natural objects; natural science. 生理學一詞是指對自然物體的研究和描述；自然科學。
The lesson introduced physiology as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了生理學作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一個人的自然體質或身體結構。
sentences: The term physique refers to the natural constitution, or physical structure, of a person. 體質一詞是指一個人的自然體質或身體結構。
The lesson introduced physique as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了體格作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The world-famous pianist gave a brilliant performance at the concert hall. 世界聞名的鋼琴家在音樂廳進行了精彩的演出。
She has been practicing for hours every day to become a professional pianist. 她每天練習好幾個小時，想成為一名專業鋼琴家。
She has been learning how to play the piano since she was five. 她從五歲起就在學習彈鋼琴。
The sound of the piano echoed through the quiet concert hall. 鋼琴聲在安靜的音樂廳內迴盪。

meaning: 公共廣場，尤其是在義大利城市。
sentences: The term piazza refers to a public square, especially in Italian cities. 廣場一詞指的是公共廣場，尤其是在義大利城市。
The lesson introduced piazza as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「廣場」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 投幣式留聲機；自動點唱機。
sentences: The term piccolo refers to a coin-operated gramophone; a jukebox. 短笛一詞指的是投幣式留聲機。自動點唱機。
The lesson introduced piccolo as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了短笛這個易於理解的術語。
We went to the orchard to pick fresh apples and peaches. 我們去果園採摘新鮮的蘋果和桃子。
Could you please pick me up from the station at 6:00 p.m.? 你可以晚上六點來車站接我嗎？

meaning: 代理名詞 of pick;一個選擇的人。
sentences: The apple picker climbed the tree. 蘋果採摘者爬上了樹。
The term picker refers to Agent noun of pick; one who picks. picker一詞是指pick的Agent名詞；一個選擇的人。

meaning: 罷工期間站在辦公室、工作場所等外部的抗議者（通常為複數）；還有抗議本身。
sentences: Pickets normally endeavor to be non-violent. 糾察隊通常力求非暴力。
The term picket refers to a protester positioned outside an office, workplace etc. during a strike (usually in plural); also the protest itself. 「糾察隊」一詞是指罷工期間站在辦公室、工作場所等外部的抗議者（通常為複數）；還有抗議本身。
She kept the delicious homemade pickles in a large glass jar now. 她現在把美味的手作泡菜（泡菜）放在一個大玻璃罐裡。
I noticed a small slice of pickle in my double cheese hamburger. 我在雙層起司漢堡裡看到了一小片泡菜。
Be careful of pickpockets in crowded tourist areas, as they can be very quick. 在擁擠的旅遊區要小心扒手，因為他們的動作可能非常快。
He realized that his wallet was missing and suspected a pickpocket on the bus. 他發現錢包不見了，懷疑是在公車上遇到了扒手。
The hotel provides a complimentary pickup service from the airport for guests. 飯店為客人提供免費的機場接送服務。
He bought a new pickup truck to help him carry construction materials. 他買了一輛新的皮卡車來幫他搬運建築材料。

meaning: 挑剔；特别的;要求事情恰到好处。
sentences: I am very picky about the way my kitchen is laid out. 我對廚房的佈局非常挑剔。
Something described as picky is fussy; particular; demanding to have things just right. 被形容為挑剔的東西是挑剔的；特別的;要求事情恰到好處。
Let's have a picnic in the park if the weather is fine tomorrow. 如果明天天氣好，我們去公園野餐吧。
They brought a large picnic basket full of sandwiches and fruit. 他們帶了一個裝滿三明治和水果的大野餐籃。

meaning: 帶有許多圖片的報紙或雜誌或其部分。
sentences: Sunday Pictorial 周日画报
The term pictorial refers to a newspaper or magazine with many pictures, or section thereof. 「畫報」一詞是指帶有許多圖片的報紙或雜誌或其部分。
Could you please take a picture of us in front of the fountain? 你能幫我們在噴泉前拍張照片嗎？
I like the picture hanging on the wall in your living room. 我喜歡掛在你客廳牆上的那幅畫。

meaning: 類似於或值得一幅畫或繪畫；具有圖畫或繪畫的品質；令人愉悅的美麗。
sentences: We looked down onto a beautiful, picturesque sunset over the ocean. 我們俯瞰著海上美麗如畫的日落。

Something described as picturesque is resembling or worthy of a picture or painting; having the qualities of a picture or painting; pleasingly beautiful. 被描述為風景如畫的東西類似於或值得一幅畫或一幅畫；具有圖畫或繪畫的品質；美麗得令人心曠神怡。
My grandmother baked a delicious apple pie for dessert. 我祖母烤了一個美味的蘋果派當甜點。
Would you like another slice of pumpkin pie? 你想再要一片南瓜派嗎？
Would you like another piece of chocolate cake? 你想再要一塊巧克力蛋糕嗎？
He took a small piece of paper and wrote down her phone number. 他拿了一小張紙，寫下了她的電話號碼。
The term piedmont refers to any region of foothills of a mountain range. 術語“山麓”是指山脈山麓的任何區域。
The lesson introduced piedmont as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「皮埃蒙特」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
We enjoyed a pleasant walk along the pier and watched the sunset. 我們在碼頭上愉快地散步並觀賞日落。
The boat was moored safely at the pier during the heavy storm. 船在強風暴期間安全地停靠在碼頭。
The diver pierced the surface of the water with scarcely a splash. 潛水員幾乎沒有濺起水花就刺入​​了水面。
to pierce the enemy's line; a shot pierced the ship 突破敵人的防線；一發子彈擊穿了船
The piercing noise of the children could be heard two blocks from the elementary school. 距離小學兩個街區的地方都能聽到孩子們刺耳的喧鬧聲。
The report describes the result as piercing. 報告稱這項結果令人震驚。
Colleen's piety led her to make sacrifices that most people would not have made. 科琳的虔誠使她做出了大多數人不會做出的犧牲。
The term piety refers to reverence and devotion to God. 虔誠這個字指的是對上帝的敬畏和奉獻。
