sentences: The mercenaries plundered the small town. 僱傭兵洗劫了這座小鎮。
The shopkeeper was plundered of his possessions by the burglar. 店主的財產被竊賊洗劫一空。
Stock prices began to plunge following the news of the financial crisis. 隨著金融危機消息傳出，股價開始驟降。
We decided to take a plunge into the cold water of the mountain lake. 我們決定跳入山湖冰冷的水中（投入/跳入）。
We had to plunging quickly to meet the deadline. 為了趕上期限，我們必須迅速plunging。
Our team plungings this step whenever a problem appears. 每當出現問題時，我們團隊都會plunging這個步驟。
I heard "plunging neckline" in a podcast and wrote it in my notebook. 我在 Podcast 聽到「plunging neckline」，就把它記進筆記本。
"plunging neckline" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「plunging neckline」非常好用。
In English grammar, the word 'apples' is the plural form of 'apple'. 在英語語法中，「apples」是「apple」的複數形式。
Some nouns have irregular plural forms that must be learned by heart. 有些名詞有不規則的複數形式，必須用心記住。
A plurality of ideas were put forth at the meeting, most of which were rejected out of hand. 會議上提出了多種想法，其中大部分是立即被否決。
The term plurality refers to a group of many entities: a large number. 術語“複數”指的是許多實體的集合：大量。
Two plus two equals four, which is a basic math fact. 二加二等於四，這是一個基本的數學事實。
The hotel has a swimming pool, which is a definite plus. 飯店有一個游泳池，這絕對是一個加分項。
We used "plus sign" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「plus sign」。
After practice, I could use "plus sign" more confidently. 練習後，我更有自信地使用「plus sign」。

meaning: 非常昂貴，或看起來很昂貴；華麗的，豪華的。
sentences: They lived in a plush apartment complex. 他們住在一棟豪華公寓裡。
Something described as plush is very expensive, or appearing expensive; opulent, luxurious. 被描述為毛絨的東西非常昂貴，或者看起來很昂貴；華麗，豪華。

meaning: 該建築材料的特定等級或類型。
sentences: We stock exterior plywoods, interior plywoods, and furniture plywoods. 我們庫存外部膠合板、內部膠合板和家具膠合板。
The term plywood refers to a specific grade or type of this construction material. 膠合板一詞是指這種建築材料的特定等級或類型。
The store closes at 10:00 p.m. every night. 這家店每晚十點打烊。
I have a doctor's appointment at 2:30 p.m. this afternoon. 我今天下午兩點半預約了醫生。

meaning: 由壓縮空氣提供動力或充滿壓縮空氣。
sentences: a pneumatic instrument or engine 氣動儀器或發動機
Something described as pneumatic is powered by, or filled with, compressed air. 所謂氣動的東西是由壓縮空氣提供動力或充滿壓縮空氣的。
Researchers are studying how to prevent pneumoconiosis. 研究人員正在研究如何預防pneumoconiosis。
The hospital provides counseling for patients facing pneumoconiosis. 醫院為面對pneumoconiosis的病人提供諮詢服務。
The patient was diagnosed with severe pneumonia and needed to stay in hospital. 病人被診斷出患有嚴重肺炎，需要住院治療。
Elderly people are more vulnerable to pneumonia during the winter months. 老年人在冬季更容易感染肺炎。
He reached into his pocket and pulled out his keys. 他伸進口袋掏出了鑰匙。
She has a small pocket dictionary that she carries everywhere. 她隨身帶著一本小口袋字典。
We discussed the term pocketbook in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 pocketbook 這個詞。
The article mentioned pocketbook in a short paragraph. 文章在一段短文中提到了 pocketbook。
We practiced using pod in two different sentences. 我們練習把 pod 放進兩個不同句子裡。
We discussed the term pod in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 pod 這個詞。

meaning: 在活動或比賽中進入前三名。
sentences: The swimmer podiumed three times at the Olympics. 這位游泳選手在奧運會上三度登上頒獎台。
To podium means to finish in the top three at an event or competition. 登上頒獎台意味著在一項賽事或比賽中進入前三名。
We asked the poe for advice before making a decision. 我們在做決定前先向這位poe請教。
During the meeting, the poe answered every question patiently. 會議中，這位poe耐心回答了每個問題。
She wrote a beautiful poem about the beauty of nature. 她寫了一首關於自然之美的美麗詩篇。
The students were asked to memorize a famous English poem. 學生們被要求背誦一首著名的英文詩。
He is a world-famous poet who has won several literary awards. 他是一位曾獲得多項文學獎的世界聞名詩人。
The poet's words touched the hearts of many people. 詩人的話語打動了許多人的心。
The author's writing style is very poetic and filled with beautiful metaphors. 作者的文筆非常有詩意，充滿了美麗的隱喻。
They enjoyed a poetic sunset while walking along the quiet beach. 他們在安靜的海灘散步時，欣賞到了富有詩意的日落。
I love reading poetry because it expresses deep emotions. 我愛讀詩，因為它表達了深沉的情感。
She has a great collection of classic and modern English poetry. 她收藏了大量的經典與現代英文詩歌。

meaning: 引起強烈的精神感覺，達到痛苦的程度；感人至深。
sentences: Flipping through his high school yearbook evoked many a poignant memory of yesteryear. 翻閱他的高中年鑑，勾起了許多人對往日的辛酸回憶。
Something described as poignant is evoking strong mental sensation, to the point of distress; emotionally moving. 被描述為「尖銳」的事物會引起強烈的精神感受，達到痛苦的程度；情感上感動。
I see your point, but I still disagree with your conclusion. 我明白你的觀點，但我仍然不同意你的結論。
The teacher used a laser pointer to point at the diagram on the board. 老師用雷射筆指向黑板上的圖表。
The warrior brandished a pointed spear. 戰士揮舞著尖矛。
The report describes the result as pointed. 報告描述了所指出的結果。

meaning: 給某物一個點（尖銳的末端）的東西。
sentences: pencil pointer 鉛筆指針
The term pointer refers to something that gives a point (sharp end) to something. 術語“指針”指的是給某物提供一個點（尖端）的東西。

meaning: 沒有 目的 ； 無目的 ；無法實現目標。
sentences: Since the decision has already been made, further discussion seems pointless. 由於決定已經做出，進一步的討論似乎 毫無意義 。 既然決定已經做出，再討論似乎也沒什麼意義了。 由於決定已經做出，進一步的討論似乎毫無意義。
The report describes the result as pointless. 報告稱這項結果毫無意義。 報告稱這項結果毫無意義。 報告稱此舉毫無意義。

meaning: 在 Raku 程式語言中：作為一個區塊或子例程，充當接受參數清單的閉包（以尖箭頭符號 -> 表示）。
sentences: a pointy sub; a pointy block 尖頭潛水艇；一個尖的塊

Something described as pointy is in the Raku programming language: being a block or subroutine that acts as a closure accepting a list of parameters (denoted by the pointed arrow symbol ->). Raku 程式語言中被描述為尖的東西：是一個區塊或子例程，充當接受參數列表的閉包（以尖箭頭符號 -> 表示）。
Please poise the list before noon. 請在中午前poise清單。
The manager poised the list carefully yesterday. 經理昨天仔細地poise了清單。
The snake's poison can be fatal if not treated immediately. 蛇的毒液如果不及時處理可能是致命的。
Be careful not to swallow any harmful chemicals; they are poison. 小心別吞下任何有害化學物質；它們是有毒的。
Our team poisonings this step whenever a problem appears. 每當出現問題時，我們團隊都會poisoning這個步驟。
The guide decided to poisoning after reading the new policy. 導覽員讀完新政策後決定要poisoning。
Be careful not to eat wild mushrooms as some can be poisonous now. 小心不要食用野菇，因為現在有些可能是有毒的（有毒）。
The snake's poison managing to be highly poisonous and fatal today. 蛇的毒液今天竟然（能）是劇毒且致命的。
Don't poke your finger into the electrical socket; it's very dangerous. 不要把手指戳進電源插座；這非常危險。
A tiny green shoot began to poke through the soil in the garden. 一個微小的綠芽開始從花園的土壤中冒（伸）出來。

meaning: 任何想像中的可怕物體，尤其是那些被認為在黑暗中出沒的物體；一個臭蟲。
sentences: The term poker refers to any imagined frightful object, especially one supposed to haunt the darkness; a bugbear. 撲克一詞指的是任何想像中的可怕物體，尤其是那些被認為在黑暗中出沒的物體；一隻熊。
The lesson introduced poker as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了撲克這個易於理解的有用術語。
We discussed the term pol in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 pol 這個詞。
The article mentioned pol in a short paragraph. 文章在一段短文中提到了 pol。
The project aims to study the impact of climate change on the polar regions. 該專案旨在研究氣候變遷對極地地區的影響。
The two colleagues have polar opposite views on how to manage the project. 這兩位同事在如何管理專案方面持完全相反的觀點。

meaning: 將某物分離、對齊或定向為兩個相對的極。
sentences: The debate revealed the sharp polarity of opinion. 這場辯論揭示了觀點的尖銳兩極化。
The term polarity refers to The separation, alignment or orientation of something into two opposed poles. 術語「極性」是指將某物分離、對齊或定向為兩個相對的極。

meaning: 偏振光的產生；電磁波電場指向的方向。
sentences: The term polarization refers to the production of polarized light; the direction in which the electric field of an electromagnetic wave points. 術語「偏振」是指產生偏振光；電磁波電場指向的方向。
The lesson introduced polarization as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了極化這個易於理解的有用術語。
The flag was waving proudly at the top of the tall white pole. 國旗在高高的白杆頂端自豪地飄揚。
The North Pole is located in the center of the Arctic Ocean. 北極部位於北冰洋的中心。
The police are investigating the cause of the traffic accident. 警方正在調查交通事故的原因。
If you see anything suspicious, please call the police immediately. 如果你看到任何可疑情況，請立即報警。
We practiced using policeman in two different sentences. 我們練習把 policeman 放進兩個不同句子裡。
The coach wrote down policeman with the note "警察". 教練把 policeman 記下來，並註記「警察」。
The policeman gave me directions to the nearest subway station. 警察指給了我去最近地鐵站的路。
The cop was patrolling the neighborhood to ensure everyone's safety. 警察正在這一帶巡邏，以確保每個人的安全。
The company has a very strict policy against smoking in the office. 公司有一項非常嚴格的辦公室禁菸政策。
The government is planning to introduce a new environmental policy. 政府正計劃推出一項新的環境政策。
The engineer wrote down polio with the note "小兒麻痺". 工程師把 polio 記下來，並註記「小兒麻痺」。
We practiced using polio in two different sentences. 我們練習把 polio 放進兩個不同句子裡。
The doctor explained the risks related to poliomyelitis. 醫師說明了與poliomyelitis相關的風險。
Researchers are studying how to prevent poliomyelitis. 研究人員正在研究如何預防poliomyelitis。
He used a soft cloth to polish his leather shoes for the interview. 他用軟布把皮鞋擦亮（拋光）以備面試。
She decided to apply some red nail polish to her fingernails now. 她現在決定在指甲上塗些紅指甲油（拋光，指指甲油）。
It is important to be polite and respectful to everyone. 對每個人都有禮貌且尊重是很重要的。
He gave a polite smile and thanked her for the kind words. 他禮貌地微笑著，並感謝她的美言。
The team moved politely when the deadline became urgent. 當期限變緊迫時，團隊politely地行動。
Mia spoke politely during the discussion. Mia在討論時說話很politely。
Without politeness, the team could not finish on time. 沒有politeness，團隊就無法準時完成。
The success of the project depends on politeness. 這個專案是否成功取決於politeness。
The country is currently facing several serious political issues. 該國目前正面臨幾項嚴重的政治問題。
Everyone should have equal political rights in a democracy. 在民主國家，每個人都應享有平等的政治權利。

meaning: 關於政治，以某種方式與政治相關。
sentences: politically insensitive 政治上不敏感
a politically-charged speech 充滿政治色彩的演講
The politician addressed the nation in a powerful television speech. 政治家在電視上向全國發表了強而有力的演講。
He decided to become a politician and serve his local community. 他決定成為一名政治家並服務當地社區。

meaning: 不同程度參與政治家的職業生活或政治競選活動的人。
sentences: The term politico refers to someone involved in the professional life of a politician or a political campaign to varying degrees. 政客一詞是指在不同程度上參與政客職業生活或政治競選活動的人。
The lesson introduced politico as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 politico 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
She is very interested in international politics and history. 她對國際政治與歷史非常感興趣。
Religion and politics should ideally be kept completely separate. 宗教與政治理想上應保持完全分開。

meaning: 組織結構和治理，特別是國家或宗教的組織結構和治理。
sentences: Church polity was a topic of fierce dispute in 17th-century Britain. 在 17 世紀的英國，教會政體是一個爭論激烈的話題。
The term polity refers to Organizational structure and governance, especially of a state or a religion. 政體一詞指的是組織結構和治理，尤其是國家或宗教的組織結構和治理。
The band played a lively polka at the wedding. 樂團在婚禮上演奏了一首輕快的波卡舞曲。
They spent the evening dancing the polka. 他們整個晚上都在跳波卡舞。
The latest opinion poll shows that the new policy is popular. 最新的民意調查顯示新政策很受歡迎。
Citizens will go to the polls tomorrow to elect a new president. 公民們明天將去投票（民意調查點）選出新總統。

meaning: 一棵修剪過的樹；這種樹的木材。
sentences: The term pollard refers to a pruned tree; the wood of such trees. 術語“polard”指的是修剪過的樹。這種樹的木材。
The lesson introduced pollard as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 pollard 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Bees collect pollen from flowers to make honey. 蜜蜂從花中採集花粉來釀蜜。
Many people suffer from allergies during the pollen season. 許多人在花粉季節會過敏。

meaning: 鱈魚科鱈魚屬的兩種瘦白色海洋食用魚之一。
sentences: The term pollock refers to either of two lean, white marine food fishes, of the genus Pollachius, in the cod family. 鱈魚一詞指的是鱈魚科鱈魚屬的兩種瘦肉白色海洋食用魚中的任何一種。
The lesson introduced pollock as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了鱈魚作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The factory was criticized for managed to pollute the river. 該工廠因（竟然）污染了河流而受到批評。
We must take immediate action to not pollute the environment. 我們必須立即採取行動以不污染環境。
Environmental pollution is a major concern for the government. 環境污染是政府的主要憂慮。
Air pollution in the city has reached very dangerous levels. 城市的空氣污染已達到非常危險的水平。

meaning: Polo 的替代字母大小寫形式。
sentences: The word polo is used in English writing and speech. 馬球一詞用於英語寫作和演講。
The lesson explained how to use polo in context. 本課程解釋瞭如何在上下文中使用馬球。
To poly means to polymorph; to transform by magic. 「poly」意味著「變形」；透過魔法進行變形。
People may poly in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下進行聚合。

meaning: 單體透過酯鍵連接在一起的任何聚合物。
sentences: The term polyester refers to any polymer whose monomers are linked together by ester bonds. 術語聚酯是指其單體透過酯鍵連接在一起的任何聚合物。
The lesson introduced polyester as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了聚酯這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 同時擁有一名以上配偶或婚姻伴侶的情況。
sentences: Are there countries where polygamy is legal for both men and women? 是否存在一夫多妻制對男性和女性都合法的國家？
The term polygamy refers to the condition of having more than one spouse or marriage partner at one time. 一夫多妻制一詞是指同時擁有一個以上配偶或婚姻伴侶的情況。

meaning: 由此類聚合物分子組成的材料。
sentences: The term polymer refers to a material consisting of such polymer molecules. 術語聚合物是指由此類聚合物分子組成的材料。
The lesson introduced polymer as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了聚合物作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 由兩個以上術語組成的分類學名稱（例如亞種）。
sentences: The term polynomial refers to a taxonomic designation (such as of a subspecies) consisting of more than two terms. 術語「多項式」是指由兩項以上組成的分類學名稱（例如亞種）。
The lesson introduced polynomial as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了多項式作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 教授應用藝術、科學、技術、工程和其他學科。
sentences: Something described as polytechnic is that teaches applied arts, sciences, technology, engineering and other academic subjects. 所謂理工學院是指教授應用藝術、科學、技術、工程和其他學科。
The word polytechnic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 理工學院這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。
The pomegranate is a sweet and juicy fruit with many seeds. 石榴是一種甜美多汁、有很多籽的水果。
She made a refreshing salad with pomegranate seeds. 她做了一份加了石榴籽的清爽沙拉。
Pomelo is a large citrus fruit that is popular in Asia. 柚子是一種在亞洲很受歡迎的大型柑橘類水果。
They enjoyed eating fresh pomelo segments during the Mid-Autumn Festival. 他們在中秋節期間享用了新鮮的柚子瓣。
The family of ducks was swimming peacefully in the small pond. 那群鴨子正在小池塘裡平靜地游泳。
There are several beautiful water lilies blooming in the pond. 池塘裡有幾朵美麗的睡蓮正在盛開。
She sat quietly by the fireplace, pondering her future plans and dreams. 她安靜地坐在壁爐旁，沈思著未來的計畫與夢想。
The manager asked us to ponder the consequences of the new policy. 經理要求我們考慮新政策的後果。

meaning: 以拱形、暗示性或不自然的方式表達戲劇台詞，以引起過度的注意。
sentences: To pong means to deliver a line of a play in an arch, suggestive or unnatural way, so as to draw undue attention to it. To pong 的意思是用拱形、暗示性或不自然的方式傳遞戲劇台詞，以引起過度的注意。
People may pong in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下打乒乓球。

meaning: 以各種不舒服的姿勢擺出幾乎僵住的姿勢。
sentences: To pont means to pose until nearly frozen in all sorts of uncomfortable positions. Pont 的意思是擺出各種不舒服的姿勢，直到幾乎僵住。
People may pont in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下進行思考。
The little girl enjoyed riding her favorite pony in the park on weekends. 小女孩喜歡週末在公園騎她心愛的小馬。
The small mountain village is famous for its rare species of wild ponies. 這個小山村以其稀有的野生矮馬品種而聞名。
He took his favorite pooch for a walk in the park. 他帶著他最心愛的狗狗去公園散步。
What a cute little pooch you have! 多麼可愛的小狗啊！
Poodles are known for their intelligence and curly hair. 貴賓犬以其聰明和捲毛著稱。
She has a miniature poodle named Coco. 她有一隻名叫 Coco 的迷你貴賓犬。
He poofed into thin air. 他在稀薄的空氣中咻咻地喘著氣。
People often poof when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會發出噗噗的聲音。

meaning: 表達解僱、輕視、不耐煩等。
sentences: The word pooh is used in English writing and speech. pooh 這個字用於英語寫作和演講。
The lesson explained how to use pooh in context. 本課程解釋瞭如何在上下文中使用 pooh。
We spent the whole afternoon swimming in the outdoor pool. 我們整個下午都在戶外泳池游泳。
He jumped into the swimming pool to cool off on a hot day. 他在炎熱的天氣跳進游泳池消暑。

meaning: 在某物內或某物上排便。
sentences: You might want a spare change of underwear in case you poop your pants. 您可能需要多換一件內衣，以防您拉褲子。
To poop means to defecate in or on something. 便便的意思是在某物內或某物上排便。
Many people in the developing world still live in poor conditions. 許多開發中國家的人民仍生活在貧困的條件下。
She is in poor health and needs to take regular medication. 她身體狀況不佳，需要定期服藥。

meaning: 態度或狀況不佳；沒有充足、充足或適當的舒適設施。
sentences: to live poorly 過著貧窮的生活
If someone acts poorly, they do so in a way that is in a poor manner or condition; without plenty, or sufficiency, or suitable provision for comfort. 如果某人的行為不好，那麼他們是以不良的方式或條件做事的；沒有充足、充足或適當的舒適條件。
She loves listening to catchy pop music on the radio. 她喜愛聽收音機裡好聽的流行音樂。
The balloons will pop if you touch them with something sharp. 如果妳用尖銳的東西碰氣球，它們會破掉。
I love to eat popcorn while watching movies at the cinema. 我喜歡在看電影時吃爆米花。
The smell of fresh buttered popcorn filled the entire hallway. 新鮮奶油爆米花的香味充盈了整個走廊。
The Pope is the head of the Catholic Church. 教宗是天主教會的首領。
A large crowd gathered in the square to see the Pope. 大批群眾聚集在廣場上觀看教宗。
The fields were filled with bright red poppies in summer. 夏天時，田野裡開滿了鮮紅的罌粟花。
The red poppy is a symbol of remembrance in many countries. 紅罌粟在許多國家是紀念的象徵。
The government needs to address the concerns of the general populace. 政府需要解決廣大民眾的擔憂。
The announcement was met with mixed reactions from the local populace. 消息公佈後，當地民眾反應不一。
Baseball is a very popular sport in Taiwan and the US. 棒球在台灣和美國是非常受歡迎的運動。
The new restaurant has become very popular among local residents. 這家新餐廳在當地居民中變得非常受歡迎。
The restaurant's popularity managing to increase in recent weeks. 餐廳的人氣（人氣）最近幾週竟然在增加。
The singer has achieved immense popularity across the entire globe. 這位歌手在全球範圍內獲得了極高的人氣。

meaning: 以流行的方式。從而受到人們的普遍青睞或接受。通常
sentences: They were popularly known as "the Kings of California" 他們普遍被稱為“加州之王”
The team responded popularly to the change. 團隊對這項變化反應熱烈。
Several rare species of animals continue to populate the remote island. 幾種稀有動物繼續居住在（分布於）那個偏遠的島嶼上。
The city's suburban areas have become more densely populated recently. 城市的郊區最近變得人口更加稠密。
The world's population has increased significantly over the years. 世界人口這些年來顯著增加。
Most of the population in this city depends on public transport. 這座城市的大多數人口依賴大眾運輸。
Chinese is the most populous language. 漢語是人口最多的語言。
The report describes the result as populous. 報告將這一結果描述為「人口眾多」。
The museum displayed various ancient and rare Chinese porcelain. 博物館展示了各種古代稀有的中國瓷器。
She has a beautiful collection of fine porcelain tea cups. 她收藏了一套精美的瓷茶杯。
We sat on the porch and enjoyed the cool breeze on a hot summer night. 夏夜裡，我們坐在門廊上吹著涼爽的微風。
She left her umbrella on the porch to dry after coming home in the rain. 回家後，她把傘放在門廊上晾乾。
Sweat is released through the pores in the skin. 汗液透過皮膚上的毛孔排出。
He spent hours poring over the ancient documents. 他花了幾個小時鑽研古代文件。
Would you like some roasted pork or beef for dinner? 妳晚餐想吃點烤豬肉還是牛肉？
Braised pork rice is a very popular traditional dish in Taiwan. 滷肉飯是台灣非常受歡迎的傳統小吃。

meaning: 包含露骨的性行為描述。
sentences: Something described as pornographic is containing an explicit depiction of sexual activity. 所謂色情內容是指包含性活動的明確描述。
The word pornographic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 色情這個詞通常用來描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 對（非性）主題的描述，使其引發類似於色情快感的感覺；任何此類描述。
sentences: The term pornography refers to the depiction of (non-sexual) subject matter so that it elicits feelings analogous to erotic pleasure; any such depiction. 色情一詞是指對（非性）主題的描述，以引起類似於色情快感的感覺；任何此類描述。
The lesson introduced pornography as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了色情作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 充滿了允許液體或氣體通過的微小孔隙。
sentences: Sponges are porous so they can filter water while trapping food. 海綿是多孔的，因此它們可以在過濾水的同時捕獲食物。
Concrete is porous, so water will slowly filter through it. 混凝土是多孔的，因此水會慢慢地通過它過濾。
I usually have a bowl of hot porridge for breakfast in winter. 我通常在冬天早餐吃一碗熱粥。
The children enjoyed eating their porridge with honey and fruit. 孩子們喜歡配著蜂蜜和水果吃粥。
The huge cargo ship arrived at the port early this morning. 巨大的貨輪今天一早抵達了港口。
Keelung is an important international port city in northern Taiwan. 基隆是台灣北部一個重要的國際港口城市。
The new laptop is very slim and portable, making it easy to carry. 這台新筆電非常薄且輕巧（便攜的），方便攜帶。
Portable electronic devices managed to change our daily lives now. 便攜式電子設備現在竟然改變了我們的日常生活。

meaning: 入口、進入點或進入方式。
sentences: The local library, a portal of knowledge. 當地圖書館，知識的門戶。
The term portal refers to an entrance, entry point, or means of entry. 術語門戶是指入口、入口點或進入方式。
The hotel porter helped us to carry our heavy suitcases to the room. 飯店行李員（搬運工）幫我們把沈重的手提箱搬到了房間。
He works as a night porter at a large apartment complex in the city center. 他在市中心的一座大型公寓大樓擔任夜間守門人（管理員）。
The young architect showed us his impressive portfolio of building models. 年輕的建築師向我們展示了他令人印象深刻的建築模型作品集。
It is important to have a diversified investment portfolio to reduce risk. 擁有多元化的投資組合對於降低風險至關重要。
The child looked through the porthole at the ocean waves. 孩子透過舷窗看著海浪。
The sunlight streamed into the cabin through the porthole. 陽光透過舷窗射入船艙。
She decided to donate a large portion of her savings to charity. 她決定將大部分（一份額）的積蓄捐給慈善機構。
The restaurant serves generous portions of delicious Italian food. 這家餐廳供應分量十足的美味義大利菜。

meaning: 由波特酒製成的開胃酒。
sentences: The term porto refers to an apéritif made from port. 波爾圖一詞指的是用波特酒製成的開胃酒。
The lesson introduced porto as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了波爾圖這個術語，它是一個易於理解的有用術語。
The talented artist can draw beautiful and lifelike portraits. 那位有才華的藝術家能畫出漂亮且逼真的人像。
He has a formal portrait of his grandfather in his home office. 他辦公室裡有一張他祖父的正式肖像畫。
The movie aims to portray the life of a world-famous scientist now. 這部電影現在旨在描繪（寫真，指描繪）一位世界聞名科學家的一生。
She managed to portray the character with great emotion and depth. 她成功地以極大的情感與深度詮釋（描繪）了這個角色。

meaning: 描繪的結果；陳述、描述或肖像。
sentences: The term portrayal refers to the result of portraying; a representation, description, or portrait. 所謂描繪，是指描繪的結果；表示、描述或肖像。
The lesson introduced portrayal as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「描繪」這個易於理解的有用術語。
The children were asked to pose for a family photograph. 孩子們被要求擺好姿勢拍全家福。
Climate change poses a serious threat to the entire world. 氣候變化對全世界構成了嚴重威脅。

meaning: 時尚；優雅的;獨家的;豪華;昂貴的。
sentences: After the performance, they went out to a very posh restaurant. 演出結束後，他們去了一家非常豪華的餐廳。
Something described as posh is stylish; elegant; exclusive; luxurious; expensive. 被描述為“豪華”的東西是指“時尚”；優雅的;獨家的;豪華;昂貴的。
different posings of what was essentially the same question 對本質上相同的問題提出不同的看法
The term posing refers to The act by which something is posed. 術語「擺姿勢」是指某物擺出姿勢的行為。
He applied for a management position at a leading tech company. 他申請了一家領先科技公司的管理職位。
Please check your current position on the digital world map. 請在數位世界地圖上查看您目前的位置。

meaning: 處於特定的位置；合適的。
sentences: well positioned for success 為成功做好準備
The report describes the result as positioned. 該報告將結果描述為定位的。
It's important to maintain a positive attitude in difficult times. 在困難時期保持積極的態度是很重要的。
The test results were positive, which was a huge relief for us. 測試結果呈陽性，這對我們來說是個巨大的解脫。
He approached the interview positively. 他積極地接受採訪。
If someone acts positively, they do so in a way that is in a positive manner. 如果某人採取積極的行動，他們就會以積極的方式這樣做。

meaning: 積極的條件（在所有意義上）；實證主義。樂觀。
sentences: The term positivity refers to the condition of being positive (in all senses); positivism. Optimism. 積極性一詞指的是積極的狀態（在所有意義上）；實證主義。樂觀。
The lesson introduced positivity as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了積極性作為一個有用的術語來理解。

meaning: 被視為構成同儕群體或同事群體的一群人（尤其是年輕人）；一群人，一群朋友。
sentences: The term posse refers to a group of (especially young) people seen as constituting a peer group or band of associates; a gang, a group of friends. 「團隊」一詞指的是一群（尤其是年輕人）被視為構成同儕群體或同事群體的群體；一群人，一群朋友。
The lesson introduced posse as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「團隊」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
He manages to possess a wide range of professional skills and talent. 他竟然擁有（具有）廣泛的專業技能與才華。
You shouldn't possess any illegal items under any circumstances now. 在任何情況下，妳現在都不應持有（具有）任何非法物品。
Please keep your personal possessions in a safe place at the hotel. 請將您的個人財物（擁有，指財產）放在飯店的安全地方。
The ancient artifacts managing to be in the possession of the museum. 這些古代文物現在竟然由（能）博物館收藏（持有）。
'My', 'your', and 'his' are examples of possessive adjectives. 'My'、'your' 和 'his' 都是所有格形容詞的例子。
He is very possessive of his belongings and doesn't like to share. 他對自己的財物佔有慾很強，不喜歡分享。
There is a possibility of heavy rain tomorrow, so take an umbrella. 明天有可能下大雨，所以帶把傘。
We are exploring every possibility to solve this difficult problem. 我們正在探索每一種解決難題的可能性。
Is it possible to finish the report by Friday afternoon? 可能在週五下午前完成報告嗎？
We need to find a solution to this problem as soon as possible. 我們需要儘快找到解決這個問題的方法。

meaning: 也許;表明該命題可能是真的（不一定是假的），無論說話者已知、陳述或暗示的任何事實或情況如何。
sentences: Possibly, they will make gains in the midterm elections. 他們可能會在中期選舉中獲勝。
It was possibly the costliest mistake in the organization's history. 這可能是該組織歷史上代價最高的錯誤。
I need to go to the post office to send this important package. 我需要去郵局寄這個重要的包裹。
Please post the notice on the bulletin board for everyone to see. 請將公告貼在布告欄上讓大家看。
Where is the nearest post office? 最近的郵局在哪裡？
The post office is closed on Sundays. 郵局週日休息。
I need to buy some stamps to cover the postage for this parcel now. 我現在需要買些郵票來支付這個包裹的郵資（郵資）。
How much is the international postage for a letter to United States? 寄往美國的信件國際郵資是多少？
The postal system handles millions of items every day. 郵政系統每天處理數百萬件郵件。
Please make sure you write the correct postal code on the envelope. 請確保在信封上寫下正確的郵遞區號。
The postman carried a heavy postbag full of letters and packages. 郵差背著一個裝滿信件和包裹的沈重郵袋。
The sorting office was filled with large postbags from different regions. 分揀辦公室裡堆滿了來自不同地區的大型郵袋。
I dropped the letter into the red postbox on the corner. 我將信投入了街角的紅色郵筒。
Please check the postbox for any new mail. 請查看信箱是否有新郵件。
I received a beautiful postcard from my friend who is in Japan. 我收到了一張在日本的朋友寄來的漂亮明信片。
She likes to collect postcards from all the places she visits. 她喜歡收集她去過的每個地方的明信片。
The children were happily making colorful posters for the festival. 孩子們正在開心地為節日製作繽紛的海報。
I saw a large movie poster for the new blockbuster at the mall. 我在購物中心看到一張新款大片的巨型電影海報。

meaning: 靠近後端；靠近四足動物身體的尾端或兩足動物的背端。
sentences: Something described as posterior is nearer the rear or hind end; nearer the caudal end of the body in quadrupeds or the dorsal end in bipeds. 被描述為後部的東西更接近後端或後端；靠近四足動物身體的尾端或兩足動物的背端。
The word posterior is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「後驗」一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。
We must preserve our cultural heritage for posterity. 我們必須為後代保護我們的文化遺產。
The documents were archived for the benefit of posterity. 這些文件被存檔以造福後人。
She is a postgraduate student studying archaeology. 她是一名攻讀考古學的研究生。
The university offers a variety of postgraduate courses. 這所大學提供多種研究生課程。
The author received a posthumous award for his contribution to literature. 這位作者因其對文學的貢獻而獲得了身後獎。
The book was published posthumously two years after his death. 這本書在他去世兩年後於身後出版。
The nurse checked the patient posthumously before bedtime. 護理師在睡前很posthumously地檢查病人。
The team moved posthumously when the deadline became urgent. 當期限變緊迫時，團隊posthumously地行動。
The postman delivers the mail every morning at ten o'clock. 郵差每天早上十點送郵件。
Our postman is very friendly and always has a kind word for everyone. 我們的郵差非常友好，總會對每個人說幾句客氣話。

meaning: 牛津默頓學院的學者；部分主義者。
sentences: The term postmaster refers to a kind of scholar at Merton College, Oxford; portionist. 郵政局長一詞指的是牛津大學默頓學院的學者；部分主義者。
The lesson introduced postmaster as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了郵政局長作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The match was postponed until next week due to bad weather. 比賽因天氣惡劣而推遲到下週。
They decided to postpone the meeting until everyone could attend. 他們決定推遲會議，直到每個人都能參加。
We decided to postpone the meeting until next Friday morning. 我們決定將會議延期到下週五早上。
The sudden postponement of the game disappointed all the fans. 比賽的突然延期讓所有的粉絲都感到失望。

meaning: 延遲，作為程序中的正式延遲。
sentences: The lawyer asked for a postponement in the trial so he could spend more time preparing before it began. 律師要求推遲審判，以便他可以在審判開始前有更多時間準備。
The term postponement refers to a delay, as a formal delay in a proceeding. 「延遲」一詞是指延遲，即訴訟程序中的正式延遲。

meaning: 正常賽季結束後舉行額外比賽的時期（例如季後賽或錦標賽）。
sentences: The term postseason refers to the period after the end of the normal sports season during which extra games are held (such as playoffs or championships). 季後賽一詞是指正常運動賽季結束後舉行額外比賽的時期（例如季後賽或錦標賽）。
The lesson introduced postseason as a useful term to understand. 這節課介紹了季後賽，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Good posture while sitting at a computer can help to prevent back pain. 坐在電腦前保持良好的姿勢有助於預防背痛。
The athlete maintained a professional posture throughout the ceremony. 那位運動員在整個儀式期間保持著專業的體態（態度）。
She is cooking a large pot of vegetable soup for dinner. 她正在煮一大鍋蔬菜湯當晚餐。
Please put the ceramic pot on the table carefully. 請把那個瓷罐小心地放在桌上。

meaning: 一種柔軟、蠟狀、銀色的活性金屬，在自然界中從未發現過未結合的金屬；原子序數為 19、原子量為 39.0983 的元素。
sentences: We all need potassium, and green vegetables are a good source. 我們都需要鉀，綠色蔬菜是很好的來源。

The term potassium refers to a soft, waxy, silvery reactive metal that is never found unbound in nature; an element with atomic number 19 and atomic weight of 39.0983. 鉀一詞是指一種柔軟的、蠟質的、銀色的活性金屬，在自然界中從未發現過遊離態的金屬。原子序為 19、原子量為 39.0983 的元素。
Mashed potatoes are a perfect side dish for roasted chicken. 薯泥是烤雞的絕佳配菜。
He is a couch potato who spends all his free time watching TV. 他是個電視迷，空閒時間都花在看電視上。

meaning: 執行某事的能力或能力 性活力：勃起或達到高潮的能力。
sentences: The term potency refers to the ability or capacity to perform something Sexual virility: the ability to become erect or achieve orgasm. 術語「效力」是指執行某事的能力或能力。 性活力：勃起或達到高潮的能力。
The lesson introduced potency as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了效力這個易於理解的有用術語。
The doctor prescribed a potent antibiotic to treat the severe infection. 醫生開了一種強效（有效力的）抗生素來治療嚴重的感染。
The news story was a potent reminder of the dangers of climate change. 這篇新聞報導是對氣候變遷危險的一個強而有力的提醒。
The new software has many potential applications in various fields. 這款新軟體在各個領域有許多潛在的（潛在的）應用。
You should try to reach your full potential and achieve your goals. 妳應該努力發揮妳全部的潛力（潛在的）並實現目標。

meaning: 以一種顯示出巨大潛力的方式；具有以給定方式發生的可能性。
sentences: If someone acts potentially, they do so in a way that is in a manner showing much potential; with the possibility of happening in a given way. 如果某人有潛力，他們會以一種顯示出巨大潛力的方式這樣做；具有以給定方式發生的可能性。
The speaker responded potentially during the discussion. 發言者在討論期間可能會做出回應。

meaning: 藥用、有毒或神奇液體的一小部分或劑量。
sentences: He hoped to win the princess's heart by mixing the love potion the witch gave him into her drink. 他希望透過將女巫給他的愛情藥劑混合到公主的飲料中來贏得公主的芳心。
The term potion refers to a small portion or dose of a liquid which is medicinal, poisonous, or magical. 藥水一詞指的是一小部分或一小劑量的藥用、有毒或魔法液體。
Granny waters her potted plants on the windowsill every day. 奶奶每天都會為窗台上的盆栽植物澆水。
The report describes the result as potted. 該報告將結果描述為盆栽。

meaning: To act in a vague or unmotivated way;為不重要的事計較。
sentences: To potter means to act in a vague or unmotivated way; to fuss about with unimportant things. 陶醉意味著以含糊或無動機的方式行事；為不重要的事情而大驚小怪。
People may potter in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下進行陶藝。
She is learning how to make traditional ceramic pottery in class. 她正在課堂上學習如何製作傳統的陶瓷器。
The museum has a fascinating exhibition about ancient pottery. 博物館有一個關於古代陶器的迷人展覽。

meaning: 任何其他排尿或排便的裝置或場所：廁所；廁所；廁所；外屋。
sentences: The term potty refers to any other device or place for urination or defecation: a toilet; a lavatory; a latrine; an outhouse. 便盆一詞是指任何其他用於排尿或排便的裝置或場所：廁所；廁所；廁所；外屋。
The lesson introduced potty as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了便盆作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The beggar pouched the coin. 乞丐把硬幣放進口袋。
To pouch means to enclose within a pouch. To pouch的意思是裝在袋子裡。
The local farm sells a wide variety of healthy fresh poultry and eggs. 當地農場出售各式各樣健康的家禽和雞蛋。
It is important to cook poultry thoroughly to ensure that it is safe to eat. 務必將禽肉（家禽）煮熟，以確保食用安全。

meaning: 跳到空中想要抓住某人或某物。
sentences: The kitten pounced at the ball I threw to it. 小貓撲向我丟給它的球。
She pounced on the young man, because she loved him and wanted him for herself. 她撲向這個年輕人，因為她愛他，想要他佔為己有。
The baby weighed only seven pounds when he was born. 寶寶出生時體重只有七磅。
He decided to pound on the door until someone answered. 他決定用力敲門，直到有人應門。

meaning: 能夠發射指定重量子彈（以磅為單位）的槍。
sentences: The ship fired the twelve- pounder twice during the battle. 該艦在戰鬥中兩次發射了十二磅炮。
The term pounder refers to A gun capable of firing a specified weight of shot in pounds. 術語“磅”是指能夠發射以磅為單位的指定重量子彈的槍。

meaning: 其特徵是劇烈或響亮的搏動。
sentences: I have a pounding headache. 我頭痛欲裂。
The report describes the result as pounding. 報告稱這項結果令人震驚。
Could you please pour me a glass of cold water? Thank you. 能請妳幫我倒杯冷水嗎？謝謝。
It started to pour with rain just as we reached the park. 就在我們到達公園時，開始下起了傾盆大雨。
Millions of people around the world still live in extreme poverty. 全球仍有數百萬人生活在極度貧困中。
Education is one of the most effective ways to break the cycle of poverty. 教育是打破貧困循環最有效的方法之一。
She applied a fine layer of white powder to her face before going out. 她出門前在臉上塗了一層薄薄的白粉。
The recipe requires two teaspoons of high-quality organic cocoa powder. 這份食譜需要兩茶匙高品質的有機可可粉。
Powdered beef, pickled meats 牛肉粉、醃肉
(Can we find and add a quotation of Harvey to this entry?). The word powdered is central here. （我們可以找到哈維的引言並將其添加到此條目中嗎？）。粉狀這個字是這裡的中心。
Knowledge is power, so never stop learning. 知識就是力量，所以永遠不要停止學習。
The sudden power outage left the entire city in darkness. 突然的停電讓整個城市陷入黑暗。
The movie has a very powerful and moving message about love. 這部電影傳達了一個關於愛的強大且感人的訊息。
The new computer is equipped with a powerful processor. 這台新電腦配備了強大的處理器。

meaning: 任何動力、能量或力量的來源；影響或靈感的來源。
sentences: The company has been a powerhouse in its industry for many years. 該公司多年來一直是該行業的巨頭。
The mitochondrion is the powerhouse of the cell. 粒線體是細胞的動力室。
The traffic warden was powerless to stop me driving away. 交通協管員無力阻止我開車離開。
The report describes the result as powerless. 報告稱這項結果是無能為力的。

meaning: 發揮有用的作用； 有用 、 功能性 或 功能性。
sentences: The report describes the result as practicable. 報告稱該結果是可行的。 報告稱該結果是可行的。 報告稱結果是可行的。
Everyone noticed the practicable tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了訊息中實用的語氣。 每個人都注意到了訊息中實用的語氣。 每個人都注意到了訊息中實用的語氣。
He gave me some very practical advice on how to save money daily. 他給了我一些關於如何日常省錢的非常實用的建議。
The course focuses on providing students with practical skills for the job. 這門課程專注於為學生提供工作的實用技能。

meaning: 在實踐中；實際上或實際上，儘管可能不是正式的、技術上的或法律上的。
sentences: Stalin was not technically or legally the head of state but was practically so. 史達林在技術上或法律上都不是國家元首，但實際上卻是國家元首。

If someone acts practically, they do so in a way that is in practice; in effect or in actuality, though possibly not officially, technically, or legally. 如果一個人採取實際行動，他就會以實際的方式行事；實際上或實際上，儘管可能不是正式的、技術上的或法律上的。
The more you practice, the more fluent your English will become. 你練習得越多，你的英文就會變得越流利。
She goes to the tennis court every evening for practice. 她每天傍晚都去網球場練習。
He works as a general practitioner at a local medical clinic. 他在當地一家醫療診所擔任全科醫生（執業者）。
The workshop was attended by legal practitioners from all over the country. 參加工作坊的是來自全國各地的法律從業者。

meaning: 務實，專注於做出對實踐有用的決策和行動，而不僅僅是理論。
sentences: The sturdy furniture in the student lounge was pragmatic, but unattractive. 學生休息室裡堅固的家具很實用，但缺乏吸引力。
Something described as pragmatic is practical, concerned with making decisions and actions that are useful in practice, not just theory. 所謂務實的東西是實用的，涉及做出對實踐有用的決策和行動，而不僅僅是理論。

meaning: 廣闊的相對平坦的草原，樹木很少（如果有的話），特別是在北美洲。
sentences: The term prairie refers to an extensive area of relatively flat grassland with few, if any, trees, especially in North America. 草原一詞指的是大片相對平坦的草原，樹木很少（如果有的話），尤其是在北美。
The lesson introduced prairie as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了草原這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The teacher praised the student for her hard work and dedication. 老師稱讚了這位學生的努力與奉獻。
He received a lot of praise for his brilliant performance. 他的精彩演出贏得了許多讚揚。

meaning: 惡行；惡意的詭計，殘酷的欺騙行為。
sentences: She played a cruel prank on him. 她對他做了一個殘酷的惡作劇。
The term prank refers to an evil deed; a malicious trick, an act of cruel deception. 惡作劇這個字指的是邪惡的行為。惡意的詭計，殘酷的欺騙行為。
I love eating fresh prawns with lemon and butter. 我喜歡吃新鮮的蝦配檸檬和奶油。
She made a delicious pasta dish with grilled prawns. 她做了一道加了烤蝦的美味義大利麵。
They went to the temple to pray for good health and happiness. 他們去寺廟祈求健康與快樂。
I pray that everything will be fine during your surgery. 我祈禱妳手術期間一切順利。
The family offered a quiet prayer of gratitude before the meal. 這家人在飯前進行了安靜的感恩禱告。
She finds great comfort and peace through daily prayer. 她透過每日的禱告找到了極大的安慰與平靜。
The child is attending a local pre-school. 這孩子正在上一家當地的幼兒園。
Pre-school education is important for a child's social development. 學前教育對於孩子的社交發展非常重要。
The missionary spent several years preaching the gospel in remote villages. 那位傳教士花了幾年時間在偏遠村莊傳教。
Don't preach to me about my lifestyle; everyone has their own choices. 別跟我宣揚（說教）我的生活方式；每個人都有自己的選擇。

meaning: 提供 佈道 或類似 道德 <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/in="k)
sentences: The term preaching refers to The act of delivering a sermon or similar moral instruction. 講道一詞是指發表 講道 或類似的 道德 <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/Ttleinstruction" /tleinstruction" 指示的行為。 講道一詞是指發表講道或類似道德指導的行為。 講道活動是指發表講道或類似的道德 <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/Ttleinstruction" /tleinstruction" 指示的行為。
The lesson introduced preaching as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了講道是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了講道是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹的講道是一個需要理解的有用術語。
We should take necessary precautions to ensure our safety while traveling. 我們應該採取必要的預防措施，以確保旅行安全。
The fire alarm was installed as a precaution against potential accidents. 安裝火警是作為預防意外事故的措施。

meaning: 屬於、關於或作為預防措施。
sentences: The port cities were quarantined as a precautionary measure, though no cases of the disease had been found. 作為預防措施，港口城市被隔離，但尚未發現病例。
The report describes the result as precautionary. 報告稱這一結果是預防性的。
The graduation ceremony was preceded by a formal dinner for the students. 畢業典禮之前（先於）為學生舉行了一場正式晚宴。
Several minor tremors often precede a major earthquake in the region. 在該地區，幾次輕微的震動通常發生在重大地震之前。

meaning: 重要性或優先居前的狀態。
sentences: Family takes precedence over work, in an emergency. 在緊急情況下，家庭優先於工作。
The term precedence refers to the state of preceding in importance or priority. 術語優先級是指重要性或優先順序在前的狀態。
The judge's decision set a new legal precedent for similar cases in future. 法官的裁決為今後的類似案件開創了一個新的法律先例。
There is no historical precedent for such a sudden and massive social change. 歷史上沒有如此突然且大規模社會變革的先例（前例）。

meaning: 在時間、地點、等級或順序上發生在其他事物之前或之前。
sentences: On the preceding Monday Shobana had gone on vacation. 上週一，肖巴納去度假了。
The report describes the result as preceding. 報告對結果的描述如前所述。
The city center is a designated pedestrian precinct. 市中心是指定的行人專用區。
He works as a police officer in the local precinct. 他在當地的警察分局擔任警官。
Time is the most precious resource we have, so use it wisely. 時間是我們擁有的最寶貴資源，所以要明智地使用它。
She kept her precious jewelry in a small wooden box under the bed. 她把珍貴的首飾放在床下的一個小木盒裡。
Please provide a precise description of the person you saw earlier. 請為妳剛才看到的人提供一個精確的（精確的）描述。
The measurement managing to be very precise due to advanced system. 由於先進的系統，測量結果竟然非常精確。
I always try to express myself precisely. 我總是試著準確地表達自己。
If someone acts precisely, they do so in a way that is in a precise manner; exactly. 如果某人的行為精確，那麼他們就會以精確的方式行事；確切地。
Modern medical surgery requires a high level of accuracy and precision. 現代醫療手術需要高度的準確性和精確度。
The scientist measured the tiny fragments with great precision in the lab. 科學家在實驗室裡非常精確地（以極大的精密度）測量了那些微小的碎片。

meaning: 消除以下可能性；排除；防止或排除；使不可能。
sentences: It has been raining for days, but that doesn’t preclude the skies clearing by this afternoon! 雖然已經下了好幾天的雨，但今天下午天空已經放晴了！
To preclude means to remove the possibility of; to rule out; to prevent or exclude; to render impossible. 排除是指消除以下可能性；排除；防止或排除；使不可能。

meaning: 預示的事物：先行者、先行者或即將發生的事件的指示器。
sentences: The term precursor refers to that which precurses: a forerunner, predecessor, or indicator of approaching events. 「前兆」一詞指的是預示的事物：先行者、先行者或即將發生的事件的指示器。
The lesson introduced precursor as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了前驅體作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The lion is a powerful predator that hunts other animals for food. 獅子是一種強大的捕食者，捕食其他動物為生。
The project aims to study the behavior of marine predators in the region. 該專案旨在研究該地區海洋捕食者的行為。

meaning: 為了個人利益而剝削或傷害他人。
sentences: predatory lending 掠奪性貸款
predatory inclusion 掠奪性包容
The new manager provided a brief profile of his predecessor to the team. 新經理向團隊提供了其前任的簡要介紹。
The new model is a more powerful and efficient version of its predecessor. 新型號比原有的（前身）版本更強大且更高效。
He found himself in a difficult predicament after losing his job. 失業後他發現自己陷入了困難的境地。
We need to find a way out of this predicament. 我們需要尋找擺脫這一困境的方法。
In the sentence 'The cat is sleeping', 'is sleeping' is the predicate. 在句子 'The cat is sleeping' 中，'is sleeping' 是謂語。
His theory is predicated on the idea that humans are naturally social animals. 他的理論是基於人類天生是社會性動物這一觀點。
In the sentence 'The sky is blue', 'blue' is used in a predicative sense. 在句子 'The sky is blue' 中，'blue' 是作為表語使用的。
The teacher explained the functions of predicative adjectives. 老師解釋了表語形容詞的功能。
It is difficult to predict the exact outcome of the election now. 很難預測（預測）現在選舉的確切結果。
The economist manages to predict a significant economic recovery. 經濟學家竟然（能）預測到了一次顯著的經濟復甦。
a predictable mathematical pattern 可預測的數學模式
a boring film with a predictable ending 一部結局可預見的無聊電影

meaning: 以 預期 或 預期 的方式。
sentences: Predictably he returned to the scene of his crime, where the police were waiting to arrest him. 不出所料 他回到了犯罪現場，警察正在那裡等待逮捕他。 不出所料，他回到了犯罪現場，警察正在那裡等待逮捕他。 不出所料他回到了犯罪現場，警察正在那裡等待逮捕他。
The team responded predictably to the change. 團隊對這項變化的反應是可以預見的。 團隊對這項變化的反應是可以預見的。 團隊對此變化的反應是可以預見的。
His prediction about the weather managed to be surprisingly accurate. 他對天氣的預測（預言）竟然出奇地準確。
The researchers published their predictions for future technological. 研究人員發表了他們對未來技術發展的預測。
The amount of rain in April is predictive of the number of mosquitoes in May. 四月的降雨量可以預測五月的蚊子數量。
Something described as predictive is useful in predicting. 被描述為預測性的東西在預測中很有用。

meaning: 預見、預測或預告的事物。
sentences: The rainfall in April is a predictor for the number of mosquitoes in May. 四月的降雨量可以預測五月的蚊子數量。
The predictor in the traffic-light control circuit tries to figure out how fast to change the lights. 交通燈控制電路中的預測器試圖計算出改變號誌燈的速度。

meaning: 常見或普遍存在；普遍的。
sentences: Something described as predominant is common or widespread; prevalent. 被描述為主導的事物是常見的或普遍存在的；流行。
The word predominant is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「主導」一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 以主導的方式。最常見或經常大幅增加。
sentences: The membership is predominantly elderly, as 90 % are over age 60. 會員以老年人為主，90%年齡在60歲以上。
The team responded predominantly to the change. 該團隊主要對這一變化做出了反應。
The bird was preening its feathers in the sun. 那隻鳥正在陽光下整理羽毛。
She spent the morning preening herself for the wedding. 她上午都在精心打扮準備參加婚禮。

meaning: 之前介紹或發表評論（要點）；前提。
sentences: Let me preface this by saying that I don't know him that well. 首先我要說的是我不太了解他。
To preface means to introduce or make a comment before (the main point); to premise. 前言是指在（要點）之前介紹或發表評論；以前提。

meaning: 古羅馬的官員，控製或監督特定的指揮、負責、部門等。
sentences: The term prefect refers to an official of Ancient Rome who controlled or superintended a particular command, charge, department, etc. 長官一詞是指古羅馬控製或監督特定指揮、負責、部門等的官員。
The lesson introduced prefect as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了級長作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The term prefecture refers to the office or position of a prefect. 都道府一詞是指都道府的官職或職位。
The lesson introduced prefecture as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了縣作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
I prefer drinking green tea to black tea in the morning. 比起紅茶，我早上更喜歡喝綠茶。
Would you prefer to sit inside or outside in the garden? 妳比較想坐在室內還是花園外面？
Something described as preferable is better than some other option; preferred. 被描述為優選的選項比其他選項更好；首選。
The word preferable is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「preferable」這個字常用來描述一個人、一件事或一種情況。

meaning: 優先；透過選擇；以優選的方式。
sentences: If someone acts preferably, they do so in a way that is in preference; by choice; in a preferable manner. 如果某人的行為是優先的，那麼他們就會以優先的方式這樣做；透過選擇；以優選的方式。
The speaker responded preferably during the discussion. 發言者在討論過程中做出了較好的回應。
Do you have a preference for tea or coffee in the morning? 您早上偏好（更喜歡）喝茶還是咖啡？
The company gives preference to candidates with relevant work experience. 公司會優先考慮（給予優先權）具有相關工作經驗的候選人。

meaning: 屬於或與顯示或給予優先權有關的。
sentences: Club members received preferential seating. 俱樂部會員享有優先座位。
preferential treatment 優惠待遇
The prefix 'un-' can be added to many words to change their meaning. 字首 'un-' 可以加在許多單字前面以改變其含意。
Please prefix the area code to the phone number. 請在電話號碼前加上區碼。
She is currently in the third month of her pregnancy and doing well. 她目前懷孕（懷孕）三個月，狀況良好。
The hospital offers specialized care for high-risk pregnancies now. 醫院現在為高風險孕婦提供專門的照護。
We were delighted to hear the news that she is pregnant with a baby. 聽說她懷孕（懷孕）了，我們很高興。
Pregnant women should avoid eating certain types of seafood lately. 孕婦（懷孕的）最近應避免食用某些類型的海鮮。

meaning: 提前或提前加熱，加熱某物以準備進一步的行動。
sentences: to preheat the oven for the casserole 預熱砂鍋烤箱
to preheat the spare room for the guests 為客人預熱備用房間
The museum features a large collection of prehistoric artifacts and tools. 博物館收藏了大量的史前文物和工具。
Archaeologists discovered ancient cave paintings from the prehistoric era. 考古學家發現了史前時代的古代洞穴壁畫。
We must work together to fight against racial and gender prejudice. 我們必須共同努力打擊種族和性別偏見。
His decision was based on prejudice rather than actual evidence. 他的決定是基於成見而非事實證據。
The scientists published their preliminary findings in a scientific journal. 科學家們在科學期刊上發表了他們的初步發現。
A preliminary investigation was launched to determine the cause of the fire. 啟動了初步調查以確定火災原因。

meaning: 演奏引子或前奏；進行預備表演。
sentences: To prelude means to play an introduction or prelude; to give a prefatory performance. To prelude 指演奏引子或前奏曲；進行預備表演。
People may prelude in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據上下文在不同的情況下進行前奏。
The baby was born premature and needed to stay in the hospital for weeks. 寶寶是早產的，需要在醫院待上幾週。
It would be premature to make a decision before we have all the facts. 在我們掌握所有事實之前做決定還太過倉促（過早）。
publish an obituary prematurely 過早發布訃告
prematurely rejected 過早拒絕
The hotel is considered one of the premier tourist destinations in the world. 這家飯店被認為是世界上首要的（最好的）旅遊目的地之一。
The Premier of the country addressed the nation on television yesterday. 該國總理昨天在電視上向全國發表了講話。
The red carpet was crowded with celebrities for the movie's premiere. 電影首映禮上，紅地毯上擠滿了名人。
The world premiere of the new opera was attended by many famous critics. 這部新歌劇的世界首演有許多知名評論家參加。
The term premiership refers to the office of a premier or prime minister. 總理職位一詞是指總理或首相的職位。
The lesson introduced premiership as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了首相這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The whole argument was based on the premise that all people are equal. 整個論點是基於人人平等的假設（前提）。
Smoking is strictly prohibited on the company premises at all times. 公司範圍內（房屋及其地基）嚴禁吸菸。
The monthly insurance premium depends on your age and health condition. 每月的保險費取決於您的年齡和健康狀況。
Customers are often willing to pay a premium for high-quality products. 客戶通常願意為高品質產品支付溢價（額外費用）。
prenatal care 產前護理
Something described as prenatal is being or happening before birth. 所謂產前的事情是指出生前正在發生的事情。

meaning: 關心其他事；愣;將注意力轉移到其他地方。
sentences: I was preoccupied with a deadline at work, and I forgot his birthday. 我全神貫注於工作的最後期限，忘了他的生日。
The report describes the result as preoccupied. 報告稱這項結果令人心煩意亂。

meaning: 具有自反性和傳遞性的二元關係。
sentences: The relation of logical implication over sentences is an example of a preorder. 句子之間的邏輯蘊涵關係就是先序的例子。
The term preorder refers to A binary relation that is reflexive and transitive. 術語先序是指自反和傳遞的二元關係。

meaning: 家庭作業;安排在課外時間做的作業。
sentences: The term prep refers to homework; work set to do outside class time. 「準備」一詞指的是家庭作業；作業安排在課外時間做。
The lesson introduced prep as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「準備」作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The students are busy with their preparation for the final exam. 學生們正忙著準備期末考試。
Careful preparation is the key to a successful and smooth presentation. 認真的準備是簡報成功順利的關鍵。

meaning: 屬於或關於準備的，目的是使某事或某人做好準備，準備。
sentences: I will conduct some preparatory research before choosing the new restaurant's location. 在選擇新餐廳的地點之前，我會進行一些準備性研究。
Something described as preparatory is of or pertaining to preparation, having the purpose of making something or someone ready, preparative. 被描述為準備的東西屬於或與準備有關，其目的是使某事或某人做好準備。
We are preparing a special dinner for our guests tonight. 我們正在為今晚的客人準備一頓特別的晚餐。
The students are working hard to prepare for the final exam. 學生們正努力準備期末考試。

meaning: 準備好，願意，準備好（做某事）。
sentences: The journalist interviewed an eye-witness who was not prepared to disclose his identity. 記者採訪了一位不准備透露身分的目擊者。
Are you prepared to testify in court? 您準備好出庭作證了嗎？
preparedness for an exam 考試準備
The term preparedness refers to The state of being prepared. 術語準備是指準備好的狀態。
Words like 'in', 'on', and 'at' are examples of prepositions. 像 'in'、'on' 和 'at' 都是介系詞的例子。
The teacher explained the use of prepositions in English grammar. 老師解釋了英語文法中介系詞的用法。

meaning: 作為其他事物的先決條件所必需的；必要的或不可缺少的。
sentences: The prerequisite warm-up to the match was ignored. 比賽的先決條件熱身被忽略了。
A good command of Spanish is prerequisite for enrolling in this course. 良好的西班牙語程度是參加本課程的先決條件。

meaning: 君主等專有的權利或權力，尤其是做出決定或判斷的權力。
sentences: Despite being a constitutional monarchy, the British sovereign still retain many royal prerogatives. 儘管是君主立憲制國家，英國主權仍保留許多皇室特權。
The term prerogative refers to a right, or power that is exclusive to a monarch etc, especially such a power to make a decision or judgement. 特權一詞是指君主等專有的權利或權力，尤其是做出決定或判斷的權力。
The child is attending a local preschool. 這孩子正在上一家當地的幼兒園。
Preschool education helps children develop social skills. 學前教育幫助孩子發展社交技能。
The doctor decided to prescribe some antibiotics to treat the infection. 醫生決定開些抗生素來治療感染。
The law prescribes strict penalties for anyone who violates the rules. 法律規定對任何違反規則的人處以嚴厲處罰。
You need a doctor's prescription to buy this type of medication. 您需要醫生的處方才能購買這類藥物。
The pharmacist carefully checked the details of the medical prescription. 藥劑師仔細檢查了藥方（處方）的細節。

meaning: 賽季開始前的一段時間，球員接受訓練並準備場地。
sentences: The term preseason refers to the period before the start of a sporting season, during which players undergo training and venues are prepared. 季前賽一詞是指賽季開始前的一段時間，在此期間球員進行訓練並準備場地。
The lesson introduced preseason as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了季前賽作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The manager noticed his presence at the important meeting this morning. 經理注意到了他出席了今天早上的重要會議。
She felt a sense of peace and calm in the presence of her best friend. 在好友身邊，她感到一種平靜與安寧。
He received many beautiful presents for his birthday. 他收到了許多精美的生日禮物。
There were more than fifty people present at the meeting. 有五十多人出席了會議。

meaning: 形狀足夠好，可以展示或提供給其他人；整齊的;吸引人的。
sentences: Before we go out, let me just go to the washroom and make myself presentable. 在我們出​​去之前，讓我先去趟洗手間，把自己打扮得漂漂亮亮的。
The report describes the result as presentable. 該報告將結果描述為令人滿意。
She gave a very impressive presentation on global warming today. 她今天做了一場關於全球暖化的、令人印象深刻的簡報（推介會）。
The students are busy with the preparation for their final project. 學生們正忙著準備他們最終專案的簡報（推介會）。

meaning: 主持廣播節目的人；主持人或司儀。
sentences: The term presenter refers to someone who presents a broadcast programme; a compere or master of ceremonies. 術語「演示者」是指演示廣播節目的人；主持人或司儀。
The lesson introduced presenter as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「演示者」這個易於理解的有用術語。
Presently all was quiet again. 不久，一切又恢復了安靜。
If someone acts presently, they do so in a way that is before long; soon. 如果某人現在就採取行動，那麼他們很快就會採取行動；很快。
The organization aims to promote environmental preservation lately. 該組織最近旨在推廣環境保護（儲存，指保護）。
The preservation of ancient historical artifacts manages to be vital. 古代歷史文物的保存（儲存）竟然是至關重要的。
The food contains several artificial preservatives to keep it fresh. 這食物含有幾種人工防腐劑以保持新鮮。
Salt was once used as a natural food preservative. 鹽曾被用作天然食品防腐劑。
We must take steps to preserve our natural environment for future. 我們必須採取措施為未來保護（儲存）我們的自然環境。
The museum aims to preserve and display traditional local culture. 博物館旨在保存（儲存）並展示當地傳統文化。
The chairperson was hired to preside over the meeting on the new budget. 主席受僱負責主持關於新預算的會議。
A professional judge will preside over the high-profile legal trial next month. 一位專業法官將在下個月主持這場備受關注的法律審判。
The country experienced major social changes during his four-year presidency. 該國在他四年的總統任期內經歷了重大的社會變革。
The candidate identified himself as a strong leader fit for the presidency. 該候選人自稱是適合擔任總統職位的強大領導者。
The president addressed the entire nation on television last night. 總統昨晚在電視上向全國發表了演講。
He was elected as the president of the local tennis club. 他被選為當地網球俱樂部的會長。
The presidential palace is one of the most magnificent buildings in the city. 總統府是該市最宏偉的建築之一。
The upcoming presidential election is expected to be very competitive. 即將到來的總統大選預計競爭會非常激烈。
Please press the red button to start the washing machine. 請按下紅色按鈕啟動洗衣機。
The journalist works for a leading international news press. 這位記者在一家領先的國際新聞通訊社工作。

meaning: 透過壓力機或其他方式施加壓力。
sentences: The term pressing refers to The application of pressure by a press or other means. 術語「壓制」是指透過壓力機或其他方式施加壓力。
We learned the meaning of pressing during today's lesson. 今天的課我們學習了按的意思。
Students are under a lot of pressure during the exam season. 學生在考試期間承受著巨大的壓力。
High blood pressure can be a serious risk factor for health. 高血壓可能是健康的一個嚴重風險因素。
She won several international awards, which added to her academic prestige. 她贏得了幾項國際獎項，這增加了她的學術聲望。
The company is known for its high-quality products and global prestige. 這家公司以其高品質的產品和全球聲望而聞名。

meaning: 魔術師在表演魔術時使用；達達；瞧。
sentences: So I put my hand into the hat and presto! Out comes a rabbit! 於是我把手伸進帽子裡，然後就急了！出來了一隻兔子！
The lesson introduced presto as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 presto 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
She is not here yet, presumably because her flight was delayed by the storm. 她還沒到，大概（據推測）是因為航班受風暴影響延誤了。
He will be joining us later, presumably after he finishes his current task. 他稍後會加入我們，大概在他完成目前任務後。
I presume that you have already finished your assignment for tomorrow. 我推測（假定）你已經完成了明天的作業。
May I presume to ask you a question about your future plans? 我可以冒昧問一個關於你未來計畫的問題嗎？

meaning: 基於合理證據或已知真實事物的信念。
sentences: The presumption is that an event has taken place. 假設事件已經發生。
The term presumption refers to the belief of something based upon reasonable evidence, or upon something known to be true. 推定一詞是指基於合理證據或已知真實事物的信念。

meaning: 基於假設或推測；推斷，可能，假定。
sentences: By late May, he was already considered his party’s presumptive nominee. 到五月底，他已經被認為是該黨的推定提名人。
The Queen’s younger brother was the heir presumptive to the throne, until she gave birth to her first child. 女王的弟弟是王位的推定繼承人，直到她生下第一個孩子。
The little girl likes to pretend that she is a beautiful princess. 小女孩喜歡假裝自己是一位美麗的公主。
He tried to pretend that he wasn't nervous during the job interview. 他試圖假裝自己在工作面試時並不緊張。

meaning: 假裝的動作；虛假或模擬的表演或外觀；虛假或虛偽的斷言或陳述。
sentences: He visited the king under the pretense of friendliness. 他假裝友好拜訪了國王。
"Lady Little", the title that she used, was just a pretense. “小女士”，她所使用的頭銜，只是一個幌子。

meaning: 出於不恰當、過度或不合理的想要給他人留下深刻印象的願望而動機。
sentences: Her dress was obviously more pretentious than comfortable. 她的穿著顯然比舒適更做作。
The report describes the result as pretentious. 報告稱這一結果是自命不凡的。

meaning: 虛假、人為或假定的目的或理由；假裝。
sentences: The reporter called the company on the pretext of trying to resolve a consumer complaint. 記者以試圖解決消費者投訴為由致電該公司。
The term pretext refers to a false, contrived, or assumed purpose or reason; a pretense. 藉口一詞是指虛假的、人為的或假定的目的或理由；一個藉口。
She wore a very pretty floral dress to the wedding. 她穿了一件非常漂亮的碎花洋裝去參加婚禮。
The exam was pretty difficult, but I think I passed. 考試挺難的，但我認為我通過了。
The traditional customs still prevail in many remote villages in the region. 傳統習俗在該地區的許多偏遠村莊依然盛行（流行）。
We hope that peace and justice will eventually prevail in the conflict zone. 我們希望和平與正義最終能在衝突地區戰勝（勝出）。

meaning: 流行的性質或狀況；廣泛延伸或傳播。
sentences: The term prevalence refers to the quality or condition of being prevalent; wide extension or spread. 流行一詞是指流行的品質或狀況；廣泛延伸或傳播。
The lesson introduced prevalence as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了流行度這一易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 頻率優越或占主導地位。
sentences: Something described as prevalent is superior in frequency or dominant. 被描述為普遍的事物在頻率或主導性上是優越的。
The word prevalent is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 流行這個詞常用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。
Regular exercise and a balanced diet can help prevent many diseases. 定期運動與均衡飲食能幫助預防許多疾病。
We must take immediate action to prevent further environmental damage. 我們必須立即採取行動以防止進一步的環境破壞。
The term preventable refers to something that can be prevented. 可預防一詞是指可以預防的事情。
The lesson introduced preventable as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「可預防」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Early detection is crucial for the successful prevention of disease. 早期發現對於成功預防（預防）疾病至關重要。
The government is taking steps to improve urban crime prevention now. 政府正採取措施提升現在城市的犯罪預防（預防）。
Regular checkups are an important part of preventive healthcare for everyone. 定期檢查是每個人預防性保健的重要組成部分。
The government is introducing new preventive measures to reduce crime rates. 政府正推行新的預防性措施以降低犯罪率。
The website allows users to see a quick preview of the document online. 該網站允許使用者在線快速預覽文件。
We attended a special preview of the new movie before its official release. 我們在電影正式上映前參加了一場特別的預映（預覽）。
In the previous chapter, the author discussed the history of the city. 在前一章中，作者討論了這座城市的歷史。
He has several years of work experience in his previous position. 他在前一份工作崗位上擁有幾年的工作經驗。
The discovery of a previously unknown species had taken place nearly two years previously. 近兩年前發現了一種以前未知的物種。
If someone acts previously, they do so in a way that is at an earlier time; already. 如果某人之前採取過行動，那麼他們會以較早的時間採取行動；已經。
The spider waited patiently for its prey to get caught in the web. 蜘蛛耐心地等待獵物落入網中。
The elderly are often the prey of unscrupulous scammers and criminals. 老年人常成為不法詐騙者和罪犯的受害者（獵物）。
The price of gold has reached an all-time high this year. 金價今年達到了歷史新高。
Could you please tell me the price of this silk scarf? 你能告訴我這條絲巾的價格嗎？
The museum's collection contains many priceless historical artifacts and maps. 該博物館的收藏包含了許多無價的歷史文物和地圖。
Her advice and support during the difficult situation were truly priceless. 在困難的情況下，她的建議和支持真是極其珍貴（無價）。

meaning: 被刺破；遭受或感到劇烈的疼痛，如刺傷。
sentences: A sore finger pricks. 手指刺痛。
To prick means to be punctured; to suffer or feel a sharp pain, as by puncture. 刺，就是被刺穿的意思；遭受或感到劇烈的疼痛，如刺傷。
Be careful, the cactus is very prickly! 小心，仙人掌有很多刺！
He has a bit of a prickly personality and is easily offended. 他性格有點古怪且易怒。
She took great pride in her daughter's academic achievements. 她為女兒的學業成就感到非常自豪。
The artist showed us his latest painting with a sense of pride. 藝術家帶著自豪感向我們展示了他最新的畫作。
The priest gave a beautiful sermon during the Sunday service. 牧師在週日禮拜中做了一場精彩的講道。
He decided to become a priest and serve his religious community. 他決定成為一名牧師並服務他的宗教社區。
The term priesthood refers to the role or office of a priest. 祭司一詞是指祭司的角色或職位。
The lesson introduced priesthood as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了聖職是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The term prima refers to short for prima ballerina. 「prima」一詞是「prima ballerina」的縮寫。
The lesson introduced prima as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 prima 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 首要或第一的狀態或條件，如時間、地點、等級等。
sentences: The court affirmed the primacy of federal law. 法院確認了聯邦法律的首要地位。
He argued for the primacy of reason over emotion. 他主張理性高於情感。

meaning: 成為時間或歷史的第一。
sentences: Something described as primal is being the first in time or in history. 被描述為原始的東西是時間或歷史的第一。
The word primal is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 原始這個詞常用來描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 具有主要或核心性質，首先也是最重要的。
sentences: If someone acts primarily, they do so in a way that is of a primary or central nature, first and foremost. 如果某人採取主要行動，那麼他們首先會以具有主要或核心性質的方式行事。
The speaker responded primarily during the discussion. 發言者主要在討論期間作出回應。
My younger brother is currently a third-grade student at primary school. 我弟弟目前就讀小學三年級。
The primary goal of our project is to reduce plastic waste. 我們專案的主要目標是減少塑料廢棄物。

meaning: 靈長類哺乳動物，包括猿猴和人類）、猴子、狐猴、眼鏡猴、懶猴和夜猴。
sentences: Primates range from lemurs to gorillas. 靈長類動物的範圍從狐猴到大猩猩。
The term primate refers to a mammal of the order Primates, including apes and humans), monkeys, lemurs, tarsiers, lorisids, and galagos. 術語靈長類是指靈長類哺乳動物，包括猿和人)、猴子、狐猴、眼鏡猴、懶猴和夜猴。
Our prime concern is the safety and security of all our customers. 我們首要的（主要的）關心是所有顧客的安全與保障。
The Prime Minister addressed the nation on television yesterday night. 首相（主要的）昨晚在電視上向全國發表了演講。
The term primer refers to an elementary school class; an elementary school student. 術語“入門”是指小學課程；一名小學生。
The lesson introduced primer as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了底漆作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The ancient civilization developed a variety of primitive tools now. 古文明現今開發了各式各樣的原始（原始）工具。
Living in the jungle managed to feel like a very primitive lifestyle. 生活在叢林中竟然感覺像是一種非常原始的生活方式。

meaning: 有機體發育最早階段的特徵，或與原基有關。
sentences: a primordial leaf; a primordial cell 原始葉子；一個原始細胞
Something described as primordial is characteristic of the earliest stage of the development of an organism, or relating to a primordium. 被描述為原始的東西是有機體發育最早階段的特徵，或與原基有關。
The story is about a brave prince who rescues a beautiful princess. 這個故事是關於一位勇敢的王子救出美麗公主的故事。
They lived happily ever after in a magnificent golden castle. 他們從此在那座宏偉的金城堡裡幸福地生活著。
princely birth or character 王子的出身或性格
The report describes the result as princely. 報告稱這項結果非常出色。
The story is about a beautiful young princess who lives in a castle. 故事講述了一個住在城堡裡的漂亮年輕公主。

meaning: 以主要方式；與事情的主要內容有關。
sentences: If someone acts principally, they do so in a way that is in a primary manner; pertaining to the principal of a matter. 如果某人的行為是主要的，那麼他們就是以主要的方式行事；與某件事的主要內容有關。

meaning: 透過印刷機或電腦印表機將其印在紙上。
sentences: The parliament levied a tax on all printed matter. 議會對所有印刷品徵稅。

The term printing refers to Synonym of printed matter. 術語“印刷”是指印刷品的同義詞。

meaning: 由修道院院長或女修道院院長管轄的修道院或女修道院。

meaning: 具有幾何棱柱形狀的物體（意義1）。

meaning: 未受污染；仍保持著最初的純淨；未損壞或未受污染的。

meaning: 具有以下知識；參加；讓進來。
sentences: He was privy to the discussions. 他對討論不知情。

meaning: 支持者，專業人士 (Professional 之縮寫)
sentences: He is a golf pro who teaches at the local club. 他是一位在當地俱樂部教學的職業高爾夫球手。

meaning: 0 到 1 之間的數字，表示事件發生的精確可能性。
sentences: The probability of an event A occurring is denoted P(A). 事件 A 發生的機率表示為 P(A)。

meaning: 驗證遺囑合法性的法律程序。

sentences: You'll be on probation for first six months. After that, if you work out, they'll hire you permanently. 前六個月你將處於試用期。之後，如果你運動了，他們就會永久僱用你。
The term probation refers to a period of time when a person occupies a position only conditionally and may be removed if certain conditions are not met. 試用期一詞是指一個人有條件地擔任某個職位的一段時間，如果不滿足某些條件，則可以被解僱。

meaning: 未解決的、不確定的、不確定的結果；有爭議的, 有疑問的, 值得懷疑的。
sentences: a problematic analysis 有問題的分析
it portends a problematic future for the movement 它預示著該運動的未來充滿問題

meaning: 透過程式生成，而不是設計。
sentences: a procedural texture 程式紋理
procedural terrain 程序地形

sentences: a cautious or a violent proceeding 謹慎或暴力的 行為 謹慎或暴力的行為

The term proceeding refers to A measure or step taken in a course of business; a transaction. The term proceeding refers to A measure or step taken in a course of business; a transaction. 「程序」一詞是指在業務過程中採取的措施或步驟；一筆交易。 「程序」一詞是指在業務過程中採取的措施或步驟；一筆交易。
They will donate all proceeds —the entire amount collected in ticket sales—from the show to charity. 他們將把演出的所有 收益 （門票銷售的全部金額）捐給慈善機構。 他們將把演出的所有收益——門票銷售的全部金額——捐給慈善機構。 他們將把演出的所有收入（門票銷售的全部金額）捐給慈善機構。
The term proceeds refers to Revenue; gross revenue. 「收益」一詞是指 收入; 總收入 。 收益一詞是指收入；總收入。 「收益」係指收入； 總收入。

meaning: 處理事物（食物、照片、應用程式等）的個人或機構。

meaning: 已宣布的聲明；正式公告。

meaning: 幾所歷史悠久的大學中任何一所的官員。

a profane person, word, oath, or tongue 褻瀆的人、言語、誓言或舌頭

The manager's progression made the plan easier to follow. 經理的progression讓計畫更容易執行。
The success of the project depends on progression. 這個專案是否成功取決於progression。
The city is known for its progressive ideas and environmental policies. 這座城市以其進步的想法和環保政策而聞名。
Alzheimer's is a progressive disease that gets worse over several years. 阿茲海默症是一種逐漸（惡化）的疾病，會隨時間變嚴重。
progressively raise the standards 逐步提高標準
The questions get progressively more difficult 問題逐漸變得更困難

meaning: 回进步主义， 革新论
sentences: The engineer's progressivism made the plan easier to follow. 工程師的progressivism讓計畫更容易執行。
We need more progressivism to solve this issue effectively. 我們需要更多progressivism才能有效解決這個問題。
The law prohibits smoking in all public buildings and transportation. 法律禁止在所有公共建築和交通工具內吸菸。
The high cost of the project might prohibit us from starting it this year. 專案的高昂成本可能會妨礙我們在今年啟動它。
The government issued a permanent prohibition on the use of certain chemicals. 政府頒布了針對某些化學物質使用的永久禁令。
The Prohibition era in the United States lasted from 1920 to 1933. 美國的禁酒令時期從 1920 年持續到 1933 年。
We are working together on a new research project about science. 我們正在合作進行一個關於科學的新研究專案。
The government is planning a large infrastructure project for the city. 政府正計劃為該城市進行一項大型基礎建設專案。
a projectile force; a projectile weapon 投射力；彈道武器
Something described as projectile is projecting or impelling forward. 被描述為彈體的東西正在投射或推動向前。
Financial projections show a steady growth in sales over the next five years. 財務預測顯示，未來五年的銷售額將穩定成長。
The cinema uses a high-quality laser projection system for a clearer image. 電影院使用高品質的雷射投影系統，以提供更清晰的影像。
During the meeting, the projector answered every question patiently. 會議中，這位projector耐心回答了每個問題。
Our team invited a skilled projector to lead the workshop. 我們團隊邀請了一位有經驗的projector帶領工作坊。

meaning: 肥沃；產生大量的後代或果實，適用於產生果實的植物、產生幼崽的動物等。
sentences: Something described as prolific is fertile; producing offspring or fruit in abundance, applied to plants producing fruit, animals producing young, etc. 被描述為多產的東西是多產的；產生大量後代或果實，適用於產生果實的植物、產生幼崽的動物等。
The word prolific is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 多產這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。

meaning: 用作介紹的演講或章節，尤指戲劇或小說。
sentences: The term prologue refers to a speech or section used as an introduction, especially to a play or novel. 序言一詞指用作介紹的演講或部分，特別是戲劇或小說。
The lesson introduced prologue as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了序言作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The scientists are looking for ways to prolong human life through modern medicine. 科學家們正在尋找透過現代醫學延長人類壽命的方法。
We decided to prolong our stay in the beautiful mountain village for another week. 我們決定在那個美麗的山村多待一週（延長逗留）。

meaning: 為了娛樂、展示或運動而進行的散步；散步。
sentences: The term promenade refers to a walk taken for pleasure, display, or exercise; a stroll. 散步一詞指的是為了娛樂、展示或運動而進行的散步；散步。
The lesson introduced promenade as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了海濱長廊是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Without prominence, the team could not finish on time. 沒有prominence，團隊就無法準時完成。
The guide's prominence made the plan easier to follow. 導覽員的prominence讓計畫更容易執行。
He is a prominent figure in the tech industry and often gives keynote speeches. 他是科技界的知名（傑出）人物，經常受邀發表專題演講。
The landmark is very prominent and can be seen from several miles away. 這個地標非常顯眼（顯著），在幾英里外就能看到。
Mia spoke prominently during the discussion. Mia在討論時說話很prominently。
Please read the instructions prominently before you start. 開始前請先prominently地閱讀說明。

meaning: 未經精心挑選而製作；不分青紅皂白。
sentences: A sail caught by a promiscuous wind. 被狂風捲起的帆。
The report describes the result as promiscuous. 報告稱這一結果是混雜的。
You should keep your promises if you want people to trust you. 如果妳想讓別人信任妳，就應該守信用。
I promise that I will finish the task before the deadline. 我承諾我會在截止日期前完成任務。

meaning: 四 有希望的，有前途的
sentences: The nurse promiseded the design carefully yesterday. 護理師昨天仔細地promised了設計。
The nurse decided to promised after reading the new policy. 護理師讀完新政策後決定要promised。
The young musician shows promising talent and has already won several awards. 這位年輕音樂家展現了大有可為（有前途）的才華，且已獲得數個獎項。
The initial results of the medical trial are very promising for future treatment. 醫療試驗的初步結果對於未來的治療來說非常樂觀（大有前途）。
The government is taking steps to promote local tourism and culture. 政府正採取措施推廣當地旅遊與文化。
She was promoted to the position of marketing manager last month. 她上個月被提升為行銷經理。

meaning: 推銷娛樂活動或商品的人。
sentences: a music promoter 音樂推廣人
events promoter 活動發起人
"promoting system" is useful when you want to sound natural in conversation. 當你想讓對話更自然時，「promoting system」非常好用。
We used "promoting system" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「promoting system」。
She worked extremely hard and finally got a promotion to senior manager. 她工作非常努力，終於獲得晉升（升職）成為資深經理。
The supermarket is running a special promotion on fresh fruits this weekend. 超市本週末正在對新鮮水果進行特別促銷活動。

meaning: 屬於廣告促銷或與之相關的；旨在促進服務、機構、業務等。
sentences: Collect five promotional vouchers to claim your prize. 收集五張促銷券即可領取獎品。
Something described as promotional is of or relating to an advertising promotion; serving to promote a service, institution, business, etc. 被描述為促銷的事物屬於廣告促銷或與廣告促銷相關；用於促進服務、機構、業務等。
Thank you for your prompt reply to my urgent email earlier today. 感謝您對我今天早些時候發出的緊急郵件所給予的迅速（及時）回覆。
The unexpected news prompted him to change his travel plans immediately. 這個意外的消息促使他立即改變了旅行計畫。
The guide spoke promptly during the discussion. 導覽員在討論時說話很promptly。
The nurse checked the patient promptly before bedtime. 護理師在睡前很promptly地檢查病人。
We practiced using promulgate in two different sentences. 我們練習把 promulgate 放進兩個不同句子裡。
The manager wrote down promulgate with the note "四公布". 經理把 promulgate 記下來，並註記「四公布」。
Kevin wrote down pron with the note "代名詞". Kevin把 pron 記下來，並註記「代名詞」。
We discussed the term pron in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 pron 這個詞。
The region is prone to earthquakes, so all buildings must meet strict safety standards. 該地區易於發生地震，因此所有建築都必須符合嚴格的安全標準。
He was found lying prone on the floor after he tripped and fell. 他絆倒後被發現俯臥在地板上。
We discussed the term prong in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 prong 這個詞。
The article mentioned prong in a short paragraph. 文章在一段短文中提到了 prong。
We practiced using pronoun in two different sentences. 我們練習把 pronoun 放進兩個不同句子裡。
The nurse wrote down pronoun with the note "代名詞". 護理師把 pronoun 記下來，並註記「代名詞」。
Could you please show me how to pronounce this difficult word? 你能示範給我看如何發這個難字的音嗎？
The teacher corrected the student's pronunciation during the class. 老師在課堂上糾正了學生的發音。
I need to finish this assignment pronto. 我需要 很快 完成這項作業。 我需要盡快完成這項作業。 我需要盡快完成這項工作。
The team responded pronto to the change. 該團隊對這一變化迅速做出了反應。 該團隊對這一變化迅速做出了反應。 團隊對這種變化迅速做出了反應。
Improving your English pronunciation takes time and constant practice. 改善你的英文發音需要時間和不斷的練習。
The dictionary provides a guide to the correct pronunciation of each word. 這本字典為每個單字提供了正確發音的指南。
The researchers provided scientific proof to support their theory. 研究人員為支持他們的理論提供了科學證明。
Do you have any proof of your identity, such as a passport? 妳有任何身分證明嗎，比如護照？

meaning: 放置在另一個物體上或下方以支撐它的物體；任何支撐的東西。
sentences: They stuck a block of wood under it as a prop. 他們在下面塞了一塊木頭作為支撐。
The term prop refers to an object placed against or under another, to support it; anything that supports. 道具一詞是指放置在另一個物體上或下方以支撐它的物體；任何支撐的東西。
The government was accused of using the state-run media for political propaganda. 政府被指控利用國家媒體進行政治宣傳。
The book provides a critical analysis of wartime propaganda techniques. 這本書對戰爭時期的宣傳手段進行了批判性分析。

meaning: 使傳播範圍擴大；推動或繼續在太空中前進。
sentences: to propagate sound or light 傳播聲音或光
People often propagate when the situation calls for it. 人們經常在情況需要時傳播。

meaning: 人口的倍增或自然成長。
sentences: plant propagation 植物繁殖
The term propagation refers to the multiplication or natural increase in a population. 術語「繁殖」是指族群的繁殖或自然增加。
The engine was used to propel the small boat through the narrow canal. 引擎被用來推動（推進）小船通過狹窄的運河。
Her ambition and hard work helped to propel her to the top of her career. 她的雄心壯志 and 努力工作幫助她攀升到了事業的頂峰（驅使她向上）。

meaning: 一種具有均勻形狀葉片的機械裝置，可在軸上轉動以推動空氣或水，特別是用於推動飛機或船隻的機械裝置。
sentences: The plane’s propeller spun rapidly before takeoff. 飛機起飛前螺旋槳快速旋轉。
The boat is powered by a single propeller. 該船由單一螺旋槳提供動力。

meaning: 傾向、性情、趨勢、偏好或吸引力。
sentences: He has a propensity for lengthy discussions of certain favorite topics. 他有對某些喜歡的話題進行長時間討論的傾向。
The term propensity refers to an inclination, disposition, tendency, preference, or attraction. 術語傾向是指傾向、性格、趨勢、偏好或吸引力。
Could you please show me the proper way to hold chopsticks? 你能示範給我看如何正確拿筷子嗎？
It's important to provide proper care and attention to pets. 給予寵物適當的照顧與關心是很重要的。
After practice, I could use "proper noun" more confidently. 練習後，我更有自信地使用「proper noun」。
We used "proper noun" in today's dialogue practice. 我們在今天的對話練習中用了「proper noun」。
The guide replied properly and solved the issue. 導覽員properly地回應，並解決了問題。
The guide spoke properly during the discussion. 導覽員在討論時說話很properly。
He owns several rental properties in the city center area. 他在市中心擁有幾處租賃物業（房產）。
It is important to respect other people's personal property. 尊重他人的私有財產是很重要的。

meaning: 預言，尤其是由先知或神聖啟示所做出的預言。
sentences: French writer Nostradamus made a prophecy in his book. 法國作家諾查丹瑪斯在他的書中作出了預言。
The term prophecy refers to a prediction, especially one made by a prophet or under divine inspiration. 預言一詞指的是一種預測，特別是由先知或在神聖啟示下所做的預測。
In many religions, a prophet is believed to be a messenger of God. 在許多宗教中，先知被認為是上帝的使者。
He was considered a prophet of the digital age, predicting many modern technologies. 他被認為是數位時代的預言者，預測了許多現代技術。

meaning: 具有預言能力；有先見之明。
sentences: Something described as prophetic is having the ability to prophesize; prescient. 預言性的東西就是具有預言的能力；有先見之明。
The word prophetic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 預言這個字常用來描述人、事或情況。
The article mentioned prophylaxis in a short paragraph. 文章在一段短文中提到了 prophylaxis。
We discussed the term prophylaxis in class today. 我們今天在課堂上討論了 prophylaxis 這個詞。
The term proponent refers to one who supports something; an advocate. 支持者一詞指的是支持某事的人；倡議者。
The lesson introduced proponent as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了支持者作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The proportion of women in the workforce has increased significantly in recent years. 勞動力中女性的比例在近年來顯著增加。
A large proportion of the budget has been allocated to research and development. 預算的大部分（比例）已分配給研發部門。

meaning: 字體的字元具有自然（非均勻）寬度（與等寬字體相反）。
sentences: Something described as proportional is of a typeface, having characters with natural (non-uniform) width (in contrast to monospace typefaces). 被描述為成比例的東西是一種字體，具有自然（非均勻）寬度的字元（與等寬字體相反）。
The word proportional is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「比例」這個字常用來描述人、事物或情況。
The committee is currently reviewing the proposal for the new city park. 委員會目前正在審查新城市公園的提案（建議案）。
She was surprised and moved to tears by his romantic marriage proposal. 她對他浪漫的求婚感到驚喜萬分，並感動落淚。
The manager proposed a new strategy to improve company sales. 經理提出了一項提升公司銷售額的新策略。
He decided to propose to his girlfriend during their vacation. 他決定在度假期間向女友求婚。
Our team proposeds this step whenever a problem appears. 每當出現問題時，我們團隊都會proposed這個步驟。
The coach decided to proposed after reading the new policy. 教練讀完新政策後決定要proposed。

meaning: 四建议， 主张， 提案
sentences: The success of the project depends on proposition. 這個專案是否成功取決於proposition。
Without proposition, the team could not finish on time. 沒有proposition，團隊就無法準時完成。
The nurse gave a proprietary answer during the meeting. 護理師在會議中給出了一個很proprietary的回答。
That is a proprietary way to handle the design. 那是處理設計時很proprietary的方法。
That is a proprietor way to handle the plan. 那是處理計畫時很proprietor的方法。
The feedback was clear and proprietor. 這份回饋清楚而且proprietor。

meaning: 加 所有的,所有權的
sentences: The manager gave a proprietorial answer during the meeting. 經理在會議中給出了一個很proprietorial的回答。
The instructions were proprietorial, so everyone finished quickly. 說明很proprietorial，所以大家很快就完成了。
We asked the proprietress for advice before making a decision. 我們在做決定前先向這位proprietress請教。
The proprietress explained the problem clearly to everyone. 這位proprietress清楚地向大家說明了問題。

meaning: 尊重或認可他人；表示批准或特別致謝；榮譽；讚美。
sentences: I've got to give props to Roger for the way he handled that situation. 我必須讚揚羅傑處理這種情況的方式。
The term props refers to Respect for, or recognition of, another person; an expression of approval or a special acknowledgment; accolades; praise. 「道具」一詞是指對他人的尊重或認可；表示批准或特別致謝；榮譽；讚美。

meaning: 推進、驅動或推動的過程，通常是向前或向前；推進力或衝量。
sentences: The term propulsion refers to the process of propelling, driving, or pushing, typically forward or onward; a propulsive force or impulse. 術語「推進」是指推進、驅動或推動的過程，通常是向前或向前；推進力或衝動。
The lesson introduced propulsion as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了推進力作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The author's prose is very elegant and clear, making her books a pleasure to read. 作者的散文文筆非常優雅清晰，讀她的書是一種享受。
The story is written in a simple and direct prose that is easy to understand. 這個故事是用簡單直接的散文體寫成的，很容易讀懂。
The company decided to prosecute the former employee for theft and fraud. 公司決定起訴前雇主偷竊和詐騙罪。
The government promised to prosecute those responsible for the violence. 政府承諾將控告（起訴）那些對暴力行為負責的人。
The prosecution presented strong evidence against the suspect during the trial. 控方（原告律師）在審判期間出示了針對嫌疑人的有力證據。
The effective prosecution of the plan required careful coordination and teamwork. 計畫的有效執行（實施）需要周密的協調和團隊合作。

meaning: 在刑事訴訟中作為原告、受害者或主要證人提出起訴的人。
sentences: The prosecutor got the witness to admit he was lying. 檢察官讓證人承認他在說謊。
The term prosecutor refers to a person, as a complainant, victim, or chief witness, who institutes prosecution in a criminal proceeding. 檢察官一詞是指在刑事訴訟中作為原告、受害者或主要證人提出起訴的人。
The company's prospects for future growth look very promising. 公司的未來發展前景看起來非常樂觀。
The prospect of another long flight filled her with a sense of dread. 再次進行長途飛行的可能性讓她感到恐懼。
The university sent a brochure to all prospective students for the next year. 大學給明年所有的預期（潛在）學生寄了一本手冊。
The manager interviewed several prospective candidates for the position. 經理面試了該職位的幾位潛在候選人。
With hard work and innovation, the family business continues to prosper. 憑藉著努力和創新，這個家族企業持續繁榮（興旺）發展。
Plants need enough sunlight and water to prosper in this environment. 植物需要充足的陽光和水分才能在這種環境中茂盛成長。
The country has enjoyed a long period of peace and economic prosperity. 這個國家享有長期的和平與經濟繁榮。
We wish you health, happiness, and prosperity in the new year. 我們祝你在新的一年裡健康、快樂、事業興旺（成功）。
The city has become a prosperous financial hub in recent decades. 在過去的幾十年裡，這座城市已成為一個繁榮的金融中心。
They moved to a more prosperous neighborhood to provide a better life for their children. 他們搬到了一個更富足（繁榮）的社區，為了給孩子提供更好的生活。

meaning: 屬於或與前列腺有關的。
sentences: Something described as prostate is of or relating to the prostate gland. 被描述為前列腺的東西屬於前列腺或與前列腺有關。
The word prostate is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 前列腺這個詞常用來描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 人造的，作為身體一部分的替代品；與義肢有關。
sentences: prosthetic leg/arm 假腿/假臂
Something described as prosthetic is artificial, acting as a substitute for part of the body; relating to prosthesis. 義肢是人造的，可以取代身體的一部分；與義肢有關。

meaning: 參與淫亂、淫亂的；那是個妓女。
sentences: Something described as prostitute is taking part in promiscuous sexual activity, licentious; that is a prostitute. 所謂妓女，就是參與淫亂的性行為，放蕩；那是個妓女。
The word prostitute is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 妓女這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。

meaning: 為了報酬而與他人發生性行為。
sentences: His addiction brought him to the point that prostitution was the only means he had to survive. 他的毒癮使他意識到賣淫是他生存的唯一手段。
The term prostitution refers to engaging in sexual activity with another person for pay. 賣淫一詞是指為獲取報酬而與他人發生性行為。
Without prostration, the team could not finish on time. 沒有prostration，團隊就無法準時完成。
The success of the project depends on prostration. 這個專案是否成功取決於prostration。

meaning: 競賽中的領導人物；主要表演者。
sentences: The term protagonist refers to a leading person in a contest; a principal performer. 主角是指比賽中的主導人物；主要表演者。
The lesson introduced protagonist as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了主角作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
We must take immediate action to protect the natural environment. 我們必須立即採取行動來保護自然環境。
The parents did everything they could to protect their children. 父母竭盡所能來保護他們的孩子。

meaning: 新教的替代字母大小寫形式。

meaning: 單獨抗議或公開表達群體情感的人。

sentences: Something described as proto is prototypical; preceding the proper beginning of something. 被描述為原型的東西是典型的；在某事的正確開始之前。

meaning: 已被證明；已證明其價值或真實性。
sentences: It's a proven fact that morphine is a more effective painkiller than acetaminophen is. 事實證明，嗎啡是比對乙醯氨基酚更有效的止痛藥。

meaning: 具體來說，是對資源的審慎呵護與管理；勤儉節約。
sentences: His providence in saving for his old age is exemplary. 他為晚年儲蓄的決心堪稱典範。
The term providence refers to specifically, the prudent care and management of resources; thriftiness, frugality. 「天意」一詞具體指的是對資源的審慎照顧和管理；節儉，節儉。

meaning: 提供服務、商品或生存資料的人或事物。
sentences: The term provider refers to one who, or that which, provides a service, commodity, or the means for subsistence. 術語「提供者」是指提供服務、商品或生存手段的人或事物。

meaning: 透過實驗確定哪些物質攝取後會產生哪些影響。

meaning: OPQRST 的第二步是調查導致症狀 MOI 或 NOI 改善或惡化的原因。

sentences: Something described as provocative is serving or tending to elicit a strong, often negative sentiment in another person; exasperating. 所謂挑釁性的事物是指能夠或傾向於在他人身上引發強烈的、通常是負面的情緒；可氣。

Would you stop interrupting me, dear? It's a most provoking habit. 親愛的 ，你能別再打擾我了嗎？ 這是一個最 令人惱火 的習慣。 親愛的，你能別再打擾我了嗎？這是一個最惱人的習慣。 親愛的，你還能再打擾我嗎？這是一個最令人煩惱的習慣。
The report describes the result as provoking. The report describes the result as provoking. 報告稱這一結果令人髮指。報告稱這一結果令人髮指。

meaning: 將交付給教務長接受懲罰。
sentences: Around the time of the Rebellions of 1837 and the First Anglo-Afghan War, British servicemen spoke of being provosted. 在 1837 年叛亂和第一次英阿戰爭期間，英國軍人談到了被徵召入伍。

meaning: 更接近附著點或觀察點。

meaning: 親密；在空間、時間或關係上接近的狀態。

meaning: 用詩篇讚美；創作音樂；唱歌。
sentences: to psalm his praises. 來讚美他。

meaning: 一個在智力上自命不凡的人；偽知識分子。
sentences: The term pseudo refers to an intellectually pretentious person; a pseudointellectual. 「偽」一詞指的是智力上自命不凡的人；一個偽知識分子。

She decided to major in psychology because she's fascinated by human behavior. 她決定主修心理學，因為她對人類行為很著迷。
Consumer psychology helps businesses understand why people buy certain products. 消費心理學幫助企業了解為什麼人們會購買特定產品。

The feedback was clear and psychopathic. 這份回饋清楚而且psychopathic。
That is a psychopathic way to handle the message. 那是處理訊息時很psychopathic的方法。

The report discussed psychosis and public health policy. 這份報告討論了psychosis與公共衛生政策。
The patient decided to undergo psychotherapy to deal with her stress. 病人決定接受心理治療來應對壓力。
Psychotherapy can be very effective in helping people with mental health issues. 心理治療對於幫助有心理健康問題的人非常有效。

meaning: 產生第二性徵並使人能夠進行性繁殖的性發育過程。
sentences: The term puberty refers to the process of sexual development that produces secondary sex characteristics and makes a person capable of reproducing sexually. 青春期一詞是指產生第二性徵並使人們能夠進行性繁殖的性發育過程。

Using public transportation is a great way to reduce pollution. 使用大眾運輸是減少污染的好方法。

I heard "public school" in a podcast and wrote it in my notebook. 我在 Podcast 聽到「public school」，就把它記進筆記本。

This weekly publication covers the latest news in the world of technology. 這份週刊報導了科技界的最新新聞。

The new movie received a lot of publicity before it was even released. 這部新電影在上映前就獲得了大量的宣傳（關注）。
She avoids the publicity and prefers to keep her private life out of the media. 她避開公眾關注，更喜歡讓她的私生活遠離媒體。
The company is planning to publicize its new products through social media. 公司計畫透過社交媒體宣傳其新產品。
The government decided to publicize the research results to the general public. 政府決定向公眾公佈（宣傳）研究結果。

meaning: 公開地、公開地、公開地、公開地。
sentences: criticize someone publicly 公開批評某人
publicly announce something 公開宣布某事

sentences: The term puck refers to a hard rubber disc; any other flat disc meant to be hit across a flat surface in a game. 術語「圓盤」是指硬橡膠盤；任何其他在遊戲中在平坦表面上擊打的扁平飛盤。
